}); } // Sync self name from babyData caregiver if (!famSelf.name) famSelf.name = '主要照護者'; famUpdateSelfCard(); famRenderMembers(); famRenderActivityLog(); famUpdatePills(); famUpdateSumDate(new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)); famBuildPermControls(); } // ── Tab ────────────────────────────────────────────── function famTab(tab) { ['members','summary','share','perms','stats7','board','knowledge'].forEach(t => { const btn = document.getElementById('famt-'+t); const panel = document.getElementById('fam-panel-'+t); if (btn) btn.classList.toggle('on', t===tab); if (panel) panel.style.display = t===tab ? '' : 'none'; }); if (tab==='summary') famRenderSummary(); if (tab==='perms') famBuildPermControls(); if (tab==='stats7') fam7RenderStats(); if (tab==='board') boardRender(); if (tab==='knowledge') knowRender('newborn'); } // ── Self card ───────────────────────────────────────── function famUpdateSelfCard() { const role = FAM_ROLES.find(r=>r.id===famSelf.role); const el = document.getElementById('fam-me-avatar'); const nl = document.getElementById('fam-me-name'); const rl = document.getElementById('fam-me-role'); if (el) el.textContent = famSelf.avatar || '👩'; if (nl) nl.textContent = famSelf.name || '主要照護者'; if (rl) rl.textContent = role ? role.label : '照護者'; } function openFamSelfEdit() { famSelSelfAvatar = famSelf.avatar || '👩'; famSelSelfRole = famSelf.role || 'mom'; const nameEl = document.getElementById('fam-self-name'); if (nameEl) nameEl.value = famSelf.name || ''; famBuildAvatarPicker('fam-self-avatar-picker', 'famSelSelfAvatar', famSelSelfAvatar); famBuildRoleChips('fam-self-role-chips', 'famSelSelfRole', famSelSelfRole); document.getElementById('fam-self-modal').classList.add('open'); } function famSelfBg(e) { if(e.target.id==='fam-self-modal') document.getElementById('fam-self-modal').classList.remove('open'); } function famSaveSelf() { famSelf.name = document.getElementById('fam-self-name').value.trim() || '主要照護者'; famSelf.avatar = famSelSelfAvatar; famSelf.role = famSelSelfRole; famUpdateSelfCard(); document.getElementById('fam-self-modal').classList.remove('open'); famUpdatePills(); sShowToast('✅ 個人資料已更新！'); } // ── Members ─────────────────────────────────────────── function famRenderMembers() { const el = document.getElementById('fam-members-list'); if (!el) return; if (!famMembers.length) { el.innerHTML = `
還沒有其他家庭成員
點擊「新增家庭成員」邀請家人一起記錄！
`; return; } el.innerHTML = famMembers.map(m => { const role = FAM_ROLES.find(r=>r.id===m.role); const perm = FAM_PERM_LEVELS.find(p=>p.id===m.perm); const roleColor = role?.color || '#9050C8'; return `
${m.avatar||'👤'}
${m.name}
${role?.label||''} · ${perm?.label||''}
${m.lastAction||'尚未操作'}
`; }).join(''); } function openFamModal(editId) { famEditMemberId = editId || null; famSelAvatar = '👩'; famSelRole = 'mom'; famSelPerm = 'caregiver'; const titleEl = document.getElementById('fam-modal-title'); if (editId) { const m = famMembers.find(x=>x.id===editId); if (m) { famSelAvatar = m.avatar; famSelRole = m.role; famSelPerm = m.perm; const ni = document.getElementById('fam-inp-name'); if (ni) ni.value = m.name; } if (titleEl) titleEl.textContent = '✏️ 修改成員'; } else { const ni = document.getElementById('fam-inp-name'); if (ni) ni.value = ''; if (titleEl) titleEl.textContent = '👥 新增家庭成員'; } famBuildAvatarPicker('fam-avatar-picker', 'famSelAvatar', famSelAvatar); famBuildRoleChips('fam-role-chips', 'famSelRole', famSelRole); famBuildPermLevelChips(); document.getElementById('fam-add-modal').classList.add('open'); } function famEditMember(id) { openFamModal(id); } function famModalBg(e) { if(e.target.id==='fam-add-modal') document.getElementById('fam-add-modal').classList.remove('open'); } function famBuildAvatarPicker(elId, stateVar, selected) { const el = document.getElementById(elId); if (!el) return; el.innerHTML = FAM_AVATARS.map(av => `
${av}
`).join(''); } function famBuildRoleChips(elId, stateVar, selected) { const el = document.getElementById(elId); if (!el) return; el.innerHTML = FAM_ROLES.map(r => `
${r.label}
`).join(''); } function famBuildPermLevelChips() { const el = document.getElementById('fam-perm-chips'); if (!el) return; el.innerHTML = FAM_PERM_LEVELS.map(p => ``).join(''); } function famSaveMember() { const name = document.getElementById('fam-inp-name').value.trim(); if (!name) { sShowToast('請輸入成員名稱！'); return; } const rec = { id: famEditMemberId || Date.now(), name, avatar:famSelAvatar, role:famSelRole, perm:famSelPerm, addedDate: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), lastAction:'', }; if (famEditMemberId) { const idx = famMembers.findIndex(m=>m.id===famEditMemberId); if (idx>=0) famMembers[idx] = rec; } else { famMembers.push(rec); } document.getElementById('fam-add-modal').classList.remove('open'); famRenderMembers(); famUpdatePills(); sShowToast(`✅ ${name} 已加入家庭！`); showVoice(`👨‍👩‍👦 ${name} 加入照護團隊了！一起守護${babyData.name||'寶寶'}💜`); if ('vibrate' in navigator) navigator.vibrate([80,40,80]); } function famDeleteMember(id) { famMembers = famMembers.filter(m=>m.id!==id); famRenderMembers(); famUpdatePills(); sShowToast('已移除成員'); } // ── Daily summary ──────────────────────────────────── function famUpdateSumDate(dateStr) { famSumDate = dateStr; const el = document.getElementById('fam-sum-date-label'); if (el) { const d = new Date(dateStr); const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10); el.textContent = dateStr===today ? '今天 '+dateStr : dateStr; } famRenderSummary(); } function famSumPrev() { const d = new Date(famSumDate); d.setDate(d.getDate()-1); famUpdateSumDate(d.toISOString().slice(0,10)); } function famSumNext() { const d = new Date(famSumDate); const today = new Date(); if (d >= today) return; d.setDate(d.getDate()+1); famUpdateSumDate(d.toISOString().slice(0,10)); } function famRenderSummary() { const el = document.getElementById('fam-summary-content'); if (!el) return; const dateStr = famSumDate; const name = babyData.name || '寶寶'; // Gather today's data from all logs const milkToday = (typeof milkLogs !=='undefined') ? milkLogs.filter(l=>l.ts&&new Date(l.ts).toISOString().slice(0,10)===dateStr) : []; const slToday = (typeof slLogs !=='undefined') ? slLogs.filter(l=>l.startMs&&new Date(l.startMs).toISOString().slice(0,10)===dateStr) : []; const diaperToday= (typeof diaperLogs!=='undefined') ? diaperLogs.filter(l=>l.dateStr===dateStr) : []; const careToday = (typeof careLogs !=='undefined') ? careLogs.filter(l=>l.dateStr===dateStr) : []; const milkCnt = milkToday.length; const milkCC = milkToday.filter(l=>l.type==='bottle').reduce((s,l)=>s+(l.cc||0),0); const slCnt = slToday.length; const slTotalM = slToday.reduce((s,l)=>s+((l.endMs&&l.startMs)?(l.endMs-l.startMs)/60000:0),0); const peeC = diaperToday.filter(l=>l.type==='pee').length; const pooC = diaperToday.filter(l=>l.type==='poop').length; const pad = n=>String(n).padStart(2,'0'); const fmtMs = ms => { const h=Math.floor(ms/60); const m=ms%60; return `${h}h${pad(m)}m`; }; let html = `
📋 ${dateStr} · ${name} 日報
`; // Sections const sections = [ { em:'🍼', title:'喝奶', show: milkCnt>0, text: `共 ${milkCnt} 次${milkCC?'，瓶餵約 '+milkCC+'ml':''}` }, { em:'😴', title:'睡眠', show: slCnt>0, text: `共 ${slCnt} 段，約 ${fmtMs(Math.round(slTotalM))}` }, { em:'💩', title:'尿布', show: peeC+pooC>0, text: `嗯嗯 ${pooC} 次、尿尿 ${peeC} 次` }, { em:'🩺', title:'日常護理', show: careToday.length>0, text: `完成 ${careToday.length} 項護理` }, ]; const hasSomething = sections.some(s=>s.show); if (!hasSomething) { html += `
這天還沒有紀錄
快去記錄今天的照護吧！
`; } else { sections.filter(s=>s.show).forEach(s => { html += `
${s.em}
${s.title}：${s.text}
`; }); // Weather/mood if any const outToday = (typeof outActivities!=='undefined') ? outActivities.filter(a=>a.date===dateStr) : []; if (outToday.length) { html += `
🌿
外出：${outToday.map(a=>a.place||a.cat).join('、')}
`; } } el.innerHTML = html; // Contribution stats const statsEl = document.getElementById('fam-contribution-stats'); if (statsEl) { const allCaregivers = [{name:famSelf.name||'主要照護者', avatar:famSelf.avatar||'👩', count:milkCnt+slCnt+peeC+pooC+careToday.length}, ...famMembers.map(m=>({name:m.name,avatar:m.avatar,count:0}))]; const total = allCaregivers.reduce((s,x)=>s+x.count,0); if (!total) { statsEl.innerHTML = '
暫無紀錄
'; } else { statsEl.innerHTML = allCaregivers.filter(x=>x.count>0).map(x => { const pct = Math.round(x.count/total*100); return `
${x.avatar}
${x.name}
${x.count}筆 (${pct}%)
`; }).join(''); } } } // ── Activity log ────────────────────────────────────── function famRenderActivityLog() { const el = document.getElementById('fam-activity-log'); if (!el) return; const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10); const pad = n=>String(n).padStart(2,'0'); // Collect recent events from all logs const events = []; if (typeof milkLogs!=='undefined') milkLogs.filter(l=>l.ts&&new Date(l.ts).toISOString().slice(0,10)===today).forEach(l=>{ const d=new Date(l.ts); events.push({ts:l.ts,em:'🍼',text:`喝奶 ${l.type==='bottle'?l.cc+'ml':'親餵'}`,time:`${pad(d.getHours())}:${pad(d.getMinutes())}`}); }); if (typeof slLogs!=='undefined') slLogs.filter(l=>l.startMs&&new Date(l.startMs).toISOString().slice(0,10)===today).forEach(l=>{ const d=new Date(l.startMs); events.push({ts:l.startMs,em:'😴',text:`睡覺 (${l.type==='nap'?'小睡':'夜眠'})`,time:`${pad(d.getHours())}:${pad(d.getMinutes())}`}); }); if (typeof diaperLogs!=='undefined') diaperLogs.filter(l=>l.dateStr===today).forEach(l=>{ const d=new Date(l.ts); events.push({ts:l.ts,em:l.type==='poop'?'💩':'💧',text:`換尿布 (${l.type==='poop'?'嗯嗯':'尿尿'})`,time:`${pad(d.getHours())}:${pad(d.getMinutes())}`}); }); events.sort((a,b)=>b.ts-a.ts); const recent = events.slice(0,5); if (!recent.length) { el.innerHTML='
今天還沒有照護紀錄
'; return; } el.innerHTML = recent.map(ev => `
${ev.em}
${famSelf.name||'主要照護者'}
照護
${ev.text}
${ev.time}
`).join(''); } // ── Invite code ─────────────────────────────────────── function famJoinFamily() { const code = document.getElementById('fam-join-code-inp')?.value.trim(); if (!code) { sShowToast('請貼上家人傳來的分享連結！'); return; } // Check if it's a URL (contains http or ?) if (code.startsWith('http') || code.includes('?share=')) { const url = code.startsWith('http') ? code : ('?' + code.split('?')[1]); let param = ''; try { param = new URL(code).searchParams.get('share'); } catch(e) { const m = code.match(/[?&]share=([^&]+)/); param = m ? m[1] : ''; } if (param) { famImportFromShareParam(param); return; } } // Check if it matches our own invite code if (code.toUpperCase() === famInviteCode?.toUpperCase()) { sShowToast('❗ 這是你自己的邀請碼！請讓其他家人掃描或輸入此碼。'); return; } // Short code — show instructions since this is a local-only app customConfirm( `邀請碼「${code.toUpperCase()}」已收到！\n\n` + `此 App 為單機版，要與家人共享資料，請請對方：\n` + `① 進入「我的」→「匯出全部資料」\n` + `② 把 .json 檔傳給你（LINE / AirDrop）\n` + `③ 你點「匯入備份資料」即可合併\n\n` + `或使用「分享今日小結」分享當日紀錄給家人。`, () => { goPage('page-profile'); }, '📲' ); } function famShareLink() { // Encode current data as a compressed share URL try { const safe = v => (typeof v !== 'undefined') ? v : null; const shareData = { _v: 'share1', babyData: safe(babyData), milkLogs: (milkLogs||[]).slice(0,50), // last 50 records slLogs: (slLogs ||[]).slice(0,50), diaperLogs:(diaperLogs||[]).slice(0,50), growthLogs: safe(growthLogs), }; const json = JSON.stringify(shareData); const encoded = btoa(encodeURIComponent(json)); const baseUrl = window.location.href.split('?')[0]; const shareUrl = `${baseUrl}?share=${encoded}`; if (navigator.share) { navigator.share({ title: `${babyData.name||'寶寶'}的育兒紀錄`, text: `來看看${babyData.name||'寶寶'}的最新紀錄！`, url: shareUrl, }).catch(()=>{}); } else { navigator.clipboard?.writeText(shareUrl); sShowToast('📋 分享連結已複製！貼給家人打開即可匯入'); } } catch(e) { sShowToast('⚠️ 產生連結失敗：' + e.message); } } function famImportFromShareParam(param) { try { const json = decodeURIComponent(atob(param)); const d = JSON.parse(json); if (!d._v || !d.babyData) { sShowToast('⚠️ 連結格式不對'); return; } const name = d.babyData?.name || '寶寶'; customConfirm( `收到${name}的育兒紀錄分享！\n\n` + `喝奶：${(d.milkLogs||[]).length} 筆\n` + `睡眠：${(d.slLogs||[]).length} 筆\n` + `換尿布：${(d.diaperLogs||[]).length} 筆\n\n` + `要匯入這份紀錄嗎？\n（會合併到你目前的資料中）`, () => { // Merge records (not overwrite) if (d.milkLogs) milkLogs = [...(d.milkLogs||[]), ...milkLogs].filter((x,i,a)=>a.findIndex(y=>y.id===x.id)===i); if (d.slLogs) slLogs = [...(d.slLogs||[]), ...slLogs ].filter((x,i,a)=>a.findIndex(y=>y.id===x.id)===i); if (d.diaperLogs) diaperLogs = [...(d.diaperLogs||[]),...diaperLogs].filter((x,i,a)=>a.findIndex(y=>y.id===x.id)===i); if (d.growthLogs) growthLogs = [...(d.growthLogs||[]),...growthLogs].filter((x,i,a)=>a.findIndex(y=>y.id===x.id)===i); dbSave(); updateHomeDisplay(); try { renderMilkLog(); renderChart(); } catch(e){} try { grUpdatePills(); grRenderChart(); grRenderLog(); } catch(e){} try { slUpdatePills(); } catch(e){} // Clear ?share= from URL window.history.replaceState({}, '', window.location.pathname); sShowToast('✅ 家人紀錄已合併成功！'); showVoice('家人的紀錄合併完成，一起守護' + (babyData.name||'寶寶') + ' 💜'); }, '📲' ); } catch(e) { sShowToast('⚠️ 無法解析分享連結：' + e.message); } } // Check for ?share= param on load (function famCheckShareOnLoad() { const param = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get('share'); if (param) { window.addEventListener('load', () => { setTimeout(() => famImportFromShareParam(param), 1500); }); } })(); // ── Copy / share summary ────────────────────────────── function famCopySummary() { const el = document.getElementById('fam-summary-content'); if (!el) return; const text = el.innerText.replace(/\n+/g,'\n').trim(); navigator.clipboard?.writeText(text); sShowToast('📋 每日小結已複製到剪貼簿！'); } function famShareSummary() { const el = document.getElementById('fam-summary-content'); const text = el ? el.innerText : ''; if (navigator.share) { navigator.share({ title:`${babyData.name||'寶寶'}的每日小結`, text }); } else { navigator.clipboard?.writeText(text); sShowToast('連結已複製！'); } } // ── Permission controls ─────────────────────────────── function famBuildPermControls() { const el = document.getElementById('fam-perm-controls'); if (!el) return; el.innerHTML = FAM_PERM_ITEMS.map(p => `
${p.em} ${p.label}
${famPermSettings[p.id]?'已共享':'不共享'}
`).join(''); } // ── Pills ───────────────────────────────────────────── function famUpdatePills() { document.getElementById('fam-member-count').textContent = famMembers.length + 1; // +self // Today log count const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10); let cnt = 0; if (typeof milkLogs !=='undefined') cnt += milkLogs.filter(l=>l.ts&&new Date(l.ts).toISOString().slice(0,10)===today).length; if (typeof slLogs !=='undefined') cnt += slLogs.filter(l=>l.startMs&&new Date(l.startMs).toISOString().slice(0,10)===today).length; if (typeof diaperLogs !=='undefined') cnt += diaperLogs.filter(l=>l.dateStr===today).length; document.getElementById('fam-today-logs').textContent = cnt; document.getElementById('fam-last-action').textContent = famSelf.name ? famSelf.name.slice(0,3) : '--'; } // ===================================================== // NOTIFICATION ENGINE (大項目六・小項目2) // ===================================================== // ── Core notification functions ─────────────────────── async function requestNotificationPermission() { if (!('Notification' in window)) return 'unsupported'; if (Notification.permission === 'default') { return await Notification.requestPermission(); } return Notification.permission; } function showLocalNotification(title, body, icon, tag) { if (!('Notification' in window) || Notification.permission !== 'granted') return; try { const opts = { body, icon: icon || 'icon-192.png', badge: 'icon-192.png', tag: tag || 'baby-diary', vibrate: [200, 100, 200] }; if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) { navigator.serviceWorker.ready.then(sw => sw.showNotification(title, opts)).catch(()=>{ new Notification(title, opts); }); } else { new Notification(title, opts); } nfyAddHistory(title, body); } catch(e) { console.log('Notification error:', e); } } // ── State ───────────────────────────────────────────── let nfySettings = { milk: { enabled:false, intervalMin:180, startTime:'07:00', endTime:'22:00' }, sleep: { enabled:false, wakeMinutes:90 }, diaper: { enabled:false, intervalMin:120 }, med: { enabled:false }, vax: { enabled:false, advanceDays:7 }, daily: { enabled:false, time:'21:00' }, inv: { enabled:true }, milestone: { enabled:true }, }; let nfyHistory = []; // {ts, title, body} let nfyTimers = {}; // active setTimeout/Interval IDs let nfySentToday = 0; // Chip options const MILK_INTERVALS = [60,90,120,150,180,210,240]; // minutes const WAKE_WIN_MINS = [60,75,90,105,120,150]; const DIAPER_INTERVALS = [60,90,120,150,180]; const VAX_ADVANCE = [1,3,5,7,14]; // ── Init ───────────────────────────────────────────── function nfyInit() { nfyRebuildPermCard(); nfyBuildIntervalChips('milk-interval-chips', MILK_INTERVALS, nfySettings.milk.intervalMin, 'milk', 'intervalMin'); nfyBuildIntervalChips('wake-interval-chips', WAKE_WIN_MINS, nfySettings.sleep.wakeMinutes, 'sleep', 'wakeMinutes', '分鐘'); nfyBuildIntervalChips('diaper-interval-chips',DIAPER_INTERVALS, nfySettings.diaper.intervalMin,'diaper','intervalMin'); nfyBuildIntervalChips('vax-advance-chips', VAX_ADVANCE, nfySettings.vax.advanceDays, 'vax', 'advanceDays', '天'); nfyRestoreToggles(); nfyUpdateMedList(); nfyUpdateVaxList(); nfyUpdateMilestoneInfo(); nfyUpdatePills(); nfyRebuildSchedule(); nfyRenderHistory(); nfyStartScheduler(); } // ── Tab ────────────────────────────────────────────── function nfyTab(tab) { ['reminders','schedule','history'].forEach(t => { document.getElementById('nfyt-'+t).classList.toggle('on', t===tab); document.getElementById('nfy-panel-'+t).style.display = t===tab ? '' : 'none'; }); if (tab==='schedule') nfyRebuildSchedule(); if (tab==='history') nfyRenderHistory(); } // ── Card expand toggle ──────────────────────────────── function nfyToggleCard(id) { const body = document.getElementById(id+'-body'); if (body) body.style.display = body.style.display==='none' ? '' : 'none'; } // ── Permission card ─────────────────────────────────── function nfyRebuildPermCard() { const wrap = document.getElementById('nfy-perm-card-wrap'); if (!wrap) return; const perm = ('Notification' in window) ? Notification.permission : 'unsupported'; const map = { granted: { cls:'granted', icon:'✅', title:'推播通知已開啟', desc:'所有提醒都可以正常運作！', btn:'' }, denied: { cls:'denied', icon:'❌', title:'推播通知已封鎖', desc:'請到手機「設定→通知」手動開啟，或長按 APP 圖示→通知設定。', btn:'' }, default: { cls:'default', icon:'🔔', title:'尚未授權推播通知', desc:'點擊下方按鈕授權，才能接收提醒。', btn:`` }, unsupported: { cls:'default', icon:'⚠️', title:'此裝置不支援推播通知', desc:'請改用 Chrome 或 Safari 手機瀏覽器。', btn:'' }, }; const m = map[perm] || map.default; wrap.innerHTML = `
${m.icon}
${m.title}
${m.desc}
${m.btn}
`; const permPill = document.getElementById('nfy-perm-status'); if (permPill) permPill.textContent = perm==='granted'?'✅已開':'❌未開'; } async function nfyRequestPerm() { const result = await requestNotificationPermission(); nfyRebuildPermCard(); if (result === 'granted') { sShowToast('✅ 推播通知已開啟！'); showLocalNotification('🔔 寶貝日記', '推播通知設定成功！提醒功能已啟動 🎉'); } } // ── Chip builder ───────────────────────────────────── function nfyBuildIntervalChips(elId, values, selected, settingKey, fieldKey, unit) { const el = document.getElementById(elId); if (!el) return; const u = unit || '分鐘'; el.innerHTML = values.map(v => { const lbl = v >= 60 && u==='分鐘' ? (v%60===0 ? v/60+'小時' : Math.floor(v/60)+'h'+v%60+'m') : v+u; return `
${lbl}
`; }).join(''); } function nfySetInterval(elId, val, settingKey, fieldKey) { nfySettings[settingKey][fieldKey] = val; const allValues = { 'milk-interval-chips': MILK_INTERVALS, 'wake-interval-chips': WAKE_WIN_MINS, 'diaper-interval-chips': DIAPER_INTERVALS, 'vax-advance-chips': VAX_ADVANCE, }; const unitMap = { 'milk-interval-chips':'分鐘','wake-interval-chips':'分鐘', 'diaper-interval-chips':'分鐘','vax-advance-chips':'天' }; nfyBuildIntervalChips(elId, allValues[elId], val, settingKey, fieldKey, unitMap[elId]); nfySave(); } // ── Restore toggles ─────────────────────────────────── function nfyRestoreToggles() { const keys = ['milk','sleep','diaper','med','vax','daily','inv','milestone']; keys.forEach(k => { const el = document.getElementById(k+'-rem-toggle'); if (el) el.checked = nfySettings[k]?.enabled || false; }); const milkStart = document.getElementById('milk-start-time'); const milkEnd = document.getElementById('milk-end-time'); const dailyTime = document.getElementById('daily-rem-time'); if (milkStart) milkStart.value = nfySettings.milk.startTime || '07:00'; if (milkEnd) milkEnd.value = nfySettings.milk.endTime || '22:00'; if (dailyTime) dailyTime.value = nfySettings.daily.time || '21:00'; } // ── Save settings ───────────────────────────────────── function nfySave() { const keys = ['milk','sleep','diaper','med','vax','daily','inv','milestone']; keys.forEach(k => { const el = document.getElementById(k+'-rem-toggle'); if (el) nfySettings[k].enabled = el.checked; }); const milkStart = document.getElementById('milk-start-time'); const milkEnd = document.getElementById('milk-end-time'); const dailyTime = document.getElementById('daily-rem-time'); if (milkStart) nfySettings.milk.startTime = milkStart.value; if (milkEnd) nfySettings.milk.endTime = milkEnd.value; if (dailyTime) nfySettings.daily.time = dailyTime.value; nfyUpdatePills(); nfyStartScheduler(); nfyUpdateDescriptions(); } // ── Update descriptions ─────────────────────────────── function nfyUpdateDescriptions() { const fmtMin = m => m>=60 ? (m%60===0?m/60+'小時':Math.floor(m/60)+'h'+m%60+'m') : m+'分鐘'; const milk = document.getElementById('milk-rem-desc'); const slp = document.getElementById('sleep-rem-desc'); const dia = document.getElementById('diaper-rem-desc'); const vax = document.getElementById('vax-rem-desc'); const daily= document.getElementById('daily-rem-desc'); if (milk) milk.textContent = `每 ${fmtMin(nfySettings.milk.intervalMin)} 提醒一次 (${nfySettings.milk.startTime}–${nfySettings.milk.endTime})`; if (slp) slp.textContent = `清醒超過 ${fmtMin(nfySettings.sleep.wakeMinutes)} 提醒哄睡`; if (dia) dia.textContent = `每 ${fmtMin(nfySettings.diaper.intervalMin)} 提醒查看尿布`; if (vax) vax.textContent = `接種日前 ${nfySettings.vax.advanceDays} 天提醒`; if (daily) daily.textContent = `每天 ${nfySettings.daily.time} 發送今日照護摘要`; } // ── Med list ───────────────────────────────────────── function nfyUpdateMedList() { const el = document.getElementById('med-rem-list'); if (!el) return; const meds = (typeof illMeds !== 'undefined') ? illMeds.filter(m=>m.active!==false) : []; if (!meds.length) { el.innerHTML = '
目前沒有設定中的藥物。請到「疾病與用藥」新增藥物提醒。
'; return; } el.innerHTML = meds.map(m => `
💊
${m.name}
${m.freq}
`).join(''); } // ── Vax upcoming ───────────────────────────────────── function nfyUpdateVaxList() { const el = document.getElementById('vax-upcoming-list'); if (!el || typeof VAX_SCHEDULE === 'undefined' || !babyData.birthday) return; const advance = nfySettings.vax.advanceDays; const now = Date.now(); const soon = []; VAX_SCHEDULE.forEach(vax => { vax.doses.forEach(dose => { if (typeof vaxIsDone === 'function' && vaxIsDone(vax.id, dose.doseNum)) return; const due = new Date(new Date(babyData.birthday).getTime() + dose.minMonths*30.44*86400000); const diff = Math.round((due - now)/86400000); if (diff >= 0 && diff <= 30) { soon.push({ name: vax.name+'第'+dose.doseNum+'劑', diff, dateStr: due.toISOString().slice(0,10) }); } }); }); soon.sort((a,b)=>a.diff-b.diff); if (!soon.length) { el.innerHTML = '
近30天內沒有待接種疫苗
'; return; } el.innerHTML = soon.slice(0,3).map(s => `
💉
${s.name}
${s.diff===0?'今天！':'還有'+s.diff+'天'}
`).join(''); } // ── Milestone info ──────────────────────────────────── function nfyUpdateMilestoneInfo() { const el = document.getElementById('milestone-next-info'); if (!el || !babyData.birthday) return; const ageM = Math.floor((Date.now()-new Date(babyData.birthday).getTime())/(30.44*86400000)); const nextBirthday = new Date(babyData.birthday); nextBirthday.setMonth(nextBirthday.getMonth() + ageM + 1); const daysToNext = Math.round((nextBirthday-Date.now())/86400000); el.innerHTML = `
🎂 下次月齡生日：${babyData.name||'寶寶'} 即將滿 ${ageM+1} 個月（還有 ${daysToNext} 天）
🌱 下個發展評估：月齡 ${ageM+1}M 建議完成發展篩檢
`; } // ── Scheduler engine ────────────────────────────────── function nfyStartScheduler() { try { // Clear all existing timers Object.values(nfyTimers).forEach(id => clearInterval(id)); nfyTimers = {}; const perm = ('Notification' in window) ? Notification.permission : 'denied'; if (perm !== 'granted') return; // Milk reminder if (nfySettings.milk.enabled) { const ms = nfySettings.milk.intervalMin * 60000; nfyTimers['milk'] = setInterval(() => { const now = new Date(); const [sh,sm] = nfySettings.milk.startTime.split(':').map(Number); const [eh,em] = nfySettings.milk.endTime.split(':').map(Number); const nowMin = now.getHours()*60+now.getMinutes(); const startMin = sh*60+sm, endMin = eh*60+em; if (nowMin>=startMin && nowMin<=endMin) { showLocalNotification('🍼 餵奶提醒', `${babyData.name||'寶寶'}該喝奶囉！已距上次哺乳約 ${nfySettings.milk.intervalMin} 分鐘`, null, 'milk'); nfySentToday++; nfyUpdatePills(); } }, ms); } // Diaper reminder - check every minute against last change time if (nfySettings.diaper.enabled) { nfyTimers['diaper'] = setInterval(() => { const threshold = nfySettings.diaper.intervalMin * 60000; const lastD = diaperLogs.slice().sort((a,b)=>b.ts-a.ts)[0]; const lastTs = lastD ? lastD.ts : 0; const elapsed = Date.now() - lastTs; // Update diaper page elapsed banner const banner = document.getElementById('dp-elapsed-banner'); if (banner) { if (lastTs > 0) { const hrs = Math.floor(elapsed/3600000); const mins = Math.floor((elapsed%3600000)/60000); const elapsedStr = hrs > 0 ? hrs+'小時'+mins+'分' : mins+'分鐘'; const urgency = elapsed >= threshold; banner.style.display = ''; banner.style.background = urgency ? 'rgba(255,80,80,.35)' : 'rgba(255,255,255,.15)'; banner.textContent = (urgency ? '🔔 ' : '⏱️ ') + '距上次換尿布：' + elapsedStr + (urgency ? '　建議查看！' : ''); } } // Send notification when threshold exceeded (only once per threshold period) if (lastTs > 0 && elapsed >= threshold) { const hrs = Math.floor(elapsed/3600000); const mins = Math.floor((elapsed%3600000)/60000); const elapsedStr = hrs > 0 ? hrs+'小時'+mins+'分' : mins+'分鐘'; const notifKey = 'diaper_' + Math.floor(elapsed/threshold); if (!nfyTimers['diaper_last_notif'] || nfyTimers['diaper_last_notif'] !== notifKey) { nfyTimers['diaper_last_notif'] = notifKey; showLocalNotification('💩 換尿布提醒', `${babyData.name||'寶寶'} 距上次換尿布已經 ${elapsedStr} 囉！記得查看！`, null, 'diaper'); nfySentToday++; nfyUpdatePills(); } } }, 60000); // check every minute } // Daily summary – check every minute nfyTimers['daily'] = setInterval(() => { if (!nfySettings.daily.enabled) return; const now = new Date(); const pad = n=>String(n).padStart(2,'0'); const curr = `${pad(now.getHours())}:${pad(now.getMinutes())}`; if (curr === nfySettings.daily.time) { const name = babyData.name || '寶寶'; const today = now.toDateString(); const todayMilk = typeof milkLogs!=='undefined' ? milkLogs.filter(l=>l.ts&&new Date(l.ts).toDateString()===today) : []; const mlkCount = todayMilk.length; const mlkCc = todayMilk.reduce((s,l)=>s+(l.cc||0),0); const slpLogs = typeof slLogs!=='undefined' ? slLogs.filter(l=>l.startMs&&new Date(l.startMs).toDateString()===today&&l.endMs) : []; const slpMins = slpLogs.reduce((s,l)=>s+(l.durationMins||0),0); const slpH = Math.floor(slpMins/60), slpM = slpMins%60; const slpStr = slpH>0 ? `${slpH}h${slpM>0?slpM+'m':''}` : (slpMins>0?`${slpMins}m`:'未記錄'); const poop = typeof diaperLogs!=='undefined' ? diaperLogs.filter(l=>l.type==='poop'&&new Date(l.ts).toDateString()===today).length : 0; const body = `🍼 喝奶 ${mlkCount} 次${mlkCc>0?' ('+mlkCc+'cc)':''}・😴 睡眠 ${slpStr}・💩 便便 ${poop} 次`; showLocalNotification(`📋 ${name} 今日小結`, body, null, 'daily-summary'); nfySentToday++; nfyUpdatePills(); } // Vax advance reminder if (nfySettings.vax.enabled && curr === '09:00' && typeof VAX_SCHEDULE!=='undefined' && babyData.birthday) { const advance = nfySettings.vax.advanceDays; VAX_SCHEDULE.forEach(vax => { vax.doses.forEach(dose => { if (typeof vaxIsDone==='function' && vaxIsDone(vax.id, dose.doseNum)) return; const due = new Date(new Date(babyData.birthday).getTime() + dose.minMonths*30.44*86400000); const diff = Math.round((due-Date.now())/86400000); if (diff === advance || diff === 3 || diff === 1 || diff === 0) { const dayStr = diff===0?'今天！':`還有 ${diff} 天`; showLocalNotification('💉 疫苗接種提醒', `${vax.name} 第${dose.doseNum}劑 — ${dayStr}記得預約！`, null, 'vax-'+vax.id); nfySentToday++; } }); }); } // Milestone monthly birthday check at 08:00 if (nfySettings.milestone.enabled && curr === '08:00' && babyData.birthday) { const ageM = Math.floor((Date.now()-new Date(babyData.birthday).getTime())/(30.44*86400000)); const nextBday = new Date(babyData.birthday); nextBday.setMonth(nextBday.getMonth() + ageM + 1); const diff = Math.round((nextBday-Date.now())/86400000); if (diff === 0) { showLocalNotification(`🎂 ${babyData.name||'寶寶'}滿 ${ageM+1} 個月！`, '記得拍個紀念照，並完成本月發展評估！', null, 'milestone'); nfySentToday++; } } }, 60000); nfyUpdateDescriptions(); } catch(e) { console.warn("nfyStartScheduler:", e); } } // ── Test notification ───────────────────────────────── async function nfyTest(type) { const perm = await requestNotificationPermission(); nfyRebuildPermCard(); if (perm !== 'granted') { sShowToast('請先開啟通知權限！'); return; } const name = babyData.name || '寶寶'; const msgs = { milk: { title:'🍼 餵奶提醒（測試）', body:`${name} 該喝奶囉！` }, sleep: { title:'😴 哄睡提醒（測試）', body:`${name} 清醒時間到，該哄睡了！` }, diaper: { title:'💩 換尿布提醒（測試）', body:`記得查看 ${name} 的尿布！` }, med: { title:'💊 用藥提醒（測試）', body:`${name} 藥物服用時間到！` }, vax: { title:'💉 疫苗提醒（測試）', body:`即將到疫苗接種日期，記得預約診所！` }, daily: { title:'📋 每日小結（測試）', body:`今天 ${name} 一切安好！` }, inv: { title:'📦 庫存警告（測試）', body:'尿布庫存偏低，記得補貨！' }, milestone: { title:'🎂 里程碑提醒（測試）', body:`${name} 即將滿下一個月齡！` }, }; const m = msgs[type] || { title:'🔔 測試通知', body:'通知功能正常運作！' }; showLocalNotification(m.title, m.body, null, 'test-'+type); sShowToast('🔔 測試通知已發送！'); if ('vibrate' in navigator) navigator.vibrate([100,50,100]); } // ── History ─────────────────────────────────────────── function nfyAddHistory(title, body) { nfyHistory.unshift({ ts: Date.now(), title, body }); if (nfyHistory.length > 50) nfyHistory.pop(); } function nfyRenderHistory() { const el = document.getElementById('nfy-history-list'); if (!el) return; if (!nfyHistory.length) { el.innerHTML = '
尚無通知歷史
'; return; } const pad = n=>String(n).padStart(2,'0'); el.innerHTML = nfyHistory.map(h => { const d = new Date(h.ts); const timeStr = `${d.getMonth()+1}/${d.getDate()} ${pad(d.getHours())}:${pad(d.getMinutes())}`; const em = h.title.match(/^(\S+)/)?.[1] || '🔔'; return `
${em}
${h.title}
${h.body}
${timeStr}
`; }).join(''); } function nfyClearHistory() { nfyHistory = []; nfySentToday = 0; nfyRenderHistory(); nfyUpdatePills(); sShowToast('已清除通知歷史'); } // ── Schedule preview ────────────────────────────────── function nfyRebuildSchedule() { const el = document.getElementById('nfy-schedule-list'); if (!el) return; const now = new Date(); const events = []; if (nfySettings.milk.enabled) { const [sh,sm] = nfySettings.milk.startTime.split(':').map(Number); const [eh,em] = nfySettings.milk.endTime.split(':').map(Number); const fmtMin = m => m>=60?(m%60===0?m/60+'h':Math.floor(m/60)+'h'+m%60+'m'):m+'m'; let cur = sh*60+sm; while (cur <= eh*60+em) { const h=Math.floor(cur/60), mn=cur%60; const pad=n=>String(n).padStart(2,'0'); events.push({ time:`${pad(h)}:${pad(mn)}`, em:'🍼', text:'餵奶提醒' }); cur += nfySettings.milk.intervalMin; } } if (nfySettings.diaper.enabled) { const pad=n=>String(n).padStart(2,'0'); let cur = 7*60; while (cur <= 22*60) { const h=Math.floor(cur/60), mn=cur%60; events.push({ time:`${pad(h)}:${pad(mn)}`, em:'💩', text:'換尿布提醒' }); cur += nfySettings.diaper.intervalMin; } } if (nfySettings.daily.enabled) { events.push({ time: nfySettings.daily.time, em:'📋', text:'每日小結推播' }); } if (nfySettings.vax.enabled) { events.push({ time:'09:00', em:'💉', text:'疫苗接種確認' }); } if (nfySettings.milestone.enabled) { events.push({ time:'08:00', em:'🎂', text:'月齡里程碑確認' }); } events.sort((a,b)=>a.time.localeCompare(b.time)); if (!events.length) { el.innerHTML='
尚未啟用任何提醒
請到「提醒設定」開啟需要的功能
'; return; } const nowMin = now.getHours()*60+now.getMinutes(); el.innerHTML = events.map(ev => { const [h,m] = ev.time.split(':').map(Number); const evMin = h*60+m; const isPast = evMin < nowMin; return `
${ev.em}
${ev.text}
${ev.time}
${isPast?'已過':'待推播'}
`; }).join(''); } // ── Pills ───────────────────────────────────────────── function nfyUpdatePills() { const active = Object.values(nfySettings).filter(s=>s.enabled).length; document.getElementById('nfy-active-count').textContent = active; document.getElementById('nfy-sent-today').textContent = nfySentToday; const perm = ('Notification' in window) ? Notification.permission : 'unsupported'; const permPill = document.getElementById('nfy-perm-status'); if (permPill) { permPill.textContent = perm==='granted'?'✅開':'❌關'; permPill.style.color = perm==='granted'?'#A0FFB0':'#FFB0A0'; } // Next reminder const nextPill = document.getElementById('nfy-next-label'); if (nextPill && nfySettings.milk.enabled) { nextPill.textContent = nfySettings.milk.startTime; } else if (nextPill) { nextPill.textContent = '--'; } } // ===================================================== // EXPORT ENGINE (大項目六・小項目3) // ===================================================== const EXP_CATS = [ {id:'milk', em:'🍼', name:'喝奶紀錄', on:true}, {id:'sleep', em:'😴', name:'睡眠紀錄', on:true}, {id:'diaper', em:'💩', name:'便便紀錄', on:true}, {id:'solids', em:'🥕', name:'副食品', on:true}, {id:'growth', em:'📈', name:'生長數據', on:true}, {id:'vaccine', em:'💉', name:'疫苗紀錄', on:true}, {id:'care', em:'🩺', name:'日常護理', on:false}, {id:'budget', em:'💰', name:'育兒記帳', on:false}, ]; const EXP_RANGES = [ {id:'7d', label:'近7天'}, {id:'30d', label:'近30天'}, {id:'90d', label:'近3個月'}, {id:'all', label:'全部'}, {id:'custom',label:'自訂'}, ]; let expSelRange = '30d'; let expCatEnabled = {}; let expPreviewCat = 'milk'; let expLastExport = ''; // ── Init ───────────────────────────────────────────── function expInit() { EXP_CATS.forEach(c => { if (!(c.id in expCatEnabled)) expCatEnabled[c.id] = c.on; }); expSetRange('30d', null); expRebuildRangeChips(); expRebuildCatToggles(); expRebuildPreviewTabs(); expRenderPreview(); expUpdatePills(); } // ── Tab ────────────────────────────────────────────── function expTab(tab) { ['export','backup','preview'].forEach(t => { document.getElementById('expt-'+t).classList.toggle('on', t===tab); document.getElementById('exp-panel-'+t).style.display = t===tab ? '' : 'none'; }); if (tab==='preview') { expRebuildPreviewTabs(); expRenderPreview(); } } // ── Range ───────────────────────────────────────────── function expRebuildRangeChips() { const el = document.getElementById('exp-range-chips'); if (!el) return; el.innerHTML = EXP_RANGES.map(r => `
${r.label}
` ).join(''); } function expSetRange(id, el) { expSelRange = id; expRebuildRangeChips(); const now = new Date(); const pad = n=>String(n).padStart(2,'0'); const toStr = `${now.getFullYear()}-${pad(now.getMonth()+1)}-${pad(now.getDate())}`; const fromDate = new Date(now); if (id==='7d') fromDate.setDate(now.getDate()-7); else if (id==='30d') fromDate.setDate(now.getDate()-30); else if (id==='90d') fromDate.setDate(now.getDate()-90); else if (id==='all') fromDate.setFullYear(2020); const fromStr = `${fromDate.getFullYear()}-${pad(fromDate.getMonth()+1)}-${pad(fromDate.getDate())}`; const fromEl = document.getElementById('exp-date-from'); const toEl = document.getElementById('exp-date-to'); if (fromEl) fromEl.value = fromStr; if (toEl) toEl.value = toStr; } // ── Category toggles ────────────────────────────────── function expRebuildCatToggles() { const el = document.getElementById('exp-cat-toggles'); if (!el) return; el.innerHTML = EXP_CATS.map(cat => { const on = expCatEnabled[cat.id]; return `
${cat.em} ${cat.name}
`; }).join(''); } function expToggleCat(id) { expCatEnabled[id] = !expCatEnabled[id]; expRebuildCatToggles(); } // ── Date filter helper ──────────────────────────────── function expInRange(dateStr) { const from = document.getElementById('exp-date-from')?.value; const to = document.getElementById('exp-date-to')?.value; if (!from || !to) return true; return dateStr >= from && dateStr <= to; } function expTsInRange(ts) { const d = new Date(ts); const pad = n=>String(n).padStart(2,'0'); const dateStr = `${d.getFullYear()}-${pad(d.getMonth()+1)}-${pad(d.getDate())}`; return expInRange(dateStr); } // ── Build CSV ───────────────────────────────────────── function expBuildAllCSV() { const sections = []; const pad2 = n=>String(n).padStart(2,'0'); const fmtTs = ts => { const d=new Date(ts); return `${d.getFullYear()}-${pad2(d.getMonth()+1)}-${pad2(d.getDate())} ${pad2(d.getHours())}:${pad2(d.getMinutes())}`; }; // Milk if (expCatEnabled.milk && typeof milkLogs!=='undefined') { const rows = milkLogs.filter(l=>l.ts&&expTsInRange(l.ts)) .map(l=>`${fmtTs(l.ts)},${l.type==='breast'?'親餵':'瓶餵'},${l.cc||''},${l.brand||''},${l.leftSecs||0},${l.rightSecs||0}`); if (rows.length) sections.push('=== 喝奶紀錄 ===\n時間,類型,CC數,品牌,左邊(秒),右邊(秒)\n'+rows.join('\n')); } // Sleep if (expCatEnabled.sleep && typeof slLogs!=='undefined') { const rows = slLogs.filter(l=>l.startMs&&expTsInRange(l.startMs)) .map(l=>{ const durM = l.endMs&&l.startMs ? Math.round((l.endMs-l.startMs)/60000) : ''; return `${fmtTs(l.startMs)},${l.type==='nap'?'小睡':'夜眠'},${l.endMs?fmtTs(l.endMs):''},${durM}`; }); if (rows.length) sections.push('=== 睡眠紀錄 ===\n開始時間,類型,結束時間,時長(分)\n'+rows.join('\n')); } // Diaper if (expCatEnabled.diaper && typeof diaperLogs!=='undefined') { const rows = diaperLogs.filter(l=>l.ts&&expTsInRange(l.ts)) .map(l=>`${fmtTs(l.ts)},${l.type==='poop'?'嗯嗯':'尿尿'},${l.bristolType||''},${l.poopColor||''},${l.amount||''}`); if (rows.length) sections.push('=== 便便紀錄 ===\n時間,類型,Bristol型,顏色,量\n'+rows.join('\n')); } // Growth if (expCatEnabled.growth && typeof growthLogs!=='undefined') { const rows = growthLogs.filter(l=>expInRange(l.date)) .map(l=>`${l.date},${l.ageMonths||''},${l.weight||''},${l.height||''},${l.head||''}`); if (rows.length) sections.push('=== 生長紀錄 ===\n日期,月齡,體重(kg),身高(cm),頭圍(cm)\n'+rows.join('\n')); } // Vaccine if (expCatEnabled.vaccine && typeof vaxRecords!=='undefined') { const rows = vaxRecords.filter(r=>expInRange(r.date)) .map(r=>`${r.date},${r.vaxId||''},第${r.doseNum}劑,${r.clinic||''},${r.lot||''},${r.reaction||''}`); if (rows.length) sections.push('=== 疫苗紀錄 ===\n日期,疫苗,劑次,院所,批號,反應\n'+rows.join('\n')); } // Budget if (expCatEnabled.budget && typeof bgtExpenses!=='undefined') { const rows = bgtExpenses.filter(e=>expInRange(e.date)) .map(e=>`${e.date},${e.cat||''},${e.desc||''},${e.amount||0}`); if (rows.length) sections.push('=== 育兒記帳 ===\n日期,類別,說明,金額\n'+rows.join('\n')); } const babyInfo = `寶寶：${babyData.name||''} 生日：${babyData.birthday||''} 性別：${babyData.gender==='girl'?'女':'男'}\n匯出時間：${new Date().toLocaleString('zh-TW')}\n`; return babyInfo + '\n' + sections.join('\n\n'); } // ── Export CSV ──────────────────────────────────────── async function expExportCSV() { expShowProgress('📊', 'CSV 試算表', '正在整理紀錄資料…'); await expAnimateProgress(40); const csv = expBuildAllCSV(); await expAnimateProgress(80); // BOM for Excel UTF-8 const bom = '\uFEFF'; const blob = new Blob([bom+csv], { type:'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' }); const name = babyData.name || '寶貝日記'; const from = document.getElementById('exp-date-from')?.value || ''; const to = document.getElementById('exp-date-to')?.value || ''; expDownload(blob, `${name}_紀錄_${from}_${to}.csv`); await expAnimateProgress(100); expLastExport = new Date().toLocaleDateString('zh-TW'); document.getElementById('exp-last-export').textContent = expLastExport; setTimeout(()=>document.getElementById('exp-progress-modal').classList.remove('open'), 600); sShowToast('✅ CSV 匯出成功！'); showVoice('📊 資料已匯出！用 Excel 開啟就能看到所有紀錄 🎉'); } // ── Export PDF (print window) ───────────────────────── function expExportPDF() { expShowProgress('📄','PDF 健康報告','正在產生報告…'); const name = babyData.name || '寶寶'; const age = babyData.birthday ? (() => { const m=Math.floor((Date.now()-new Date(babyData.birthday))/2629800000); return m+'個月'; })() : ''; const pad2 = n=>String(n).padStart(2,'0'); const fmtTs = ts => { const d=new Date(ts); return `${d.getMonth()+1}/${d.getDate()} ${pad2(d.getHours())}:${pad2(d.getMinutes())}`; }; // collect data const milkToday = typeof milkLogs!=='undefined' ? milkLogs.slice(-10) : []; const slToday = typeof slLogs !=='undefined' ? slLogs.slice(-7) : []; const grLast = typeof growthLogs!=='undefined'&&growthLogs.length ? growthLogs[growthLogs.length-1] : null; const vaxDone = typeof vaxRecords!=='undefined' ? vaxRecords.length : 0; const htmlContent = ` ${name} 健康報告

🍼 ${name} 健康報告

生日：${babyData.birthday||'未設定'}・月齡：${age}・性別：${babyData.gender==='girl'?'女寶寶':'男寶寶'}
匯出時間：${new Date().toLocaleString('zh-TW')}

📊 最新生長數據

${grLast?.weight||babyData.weight||'--'} kg
體重
${grLast?.height||babyData.height||'--'} cm
身高
${grLast?.head||babyData.head||'--'} cm
頭圍

🍼 最近喝奶紀錄（最後10筆）

${milkToday.map(l=>``).join('')}
時間類型CC數品牌
${fmtTs(l.ts)}${l.type==='breast'?'親餵':'瓶餵'}${l.cc||'--'}${l.brand||'--'}

😴 最近睡眠紀錄（最後7筆）

${slToday.map(l=>{ const dur=l.endMs&&l.startMs?Math.round((l.endMs-l.startMs)/60000)+'分':'計時中'; return ``; }).join('')}
開始時間類型時長
${fmtTs(l.startMs)}${l.type==='nap'?'小睡':'夜眠'}${dur}

💉 疫苗接種狀況

已完成接種：${vaxDone} 劑
由「寶貝日記 Baby Diary」APP 產生 · ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('zh-TW')}
`; const blob = new Blob([htmlContent], { type:'text/html;charset=utf-8;' }); const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob); const win = window.open(url, '_blank'); if (win) { win.onload = () => { win.focus(); win.print(); }; } document.getElementById('exp-progress-modal').classList.remove('open'); expLastExport = new Date().toLocaleDateString('zh-TW'); document.getElementById('exp-last-export').textContent = expLastExport; sShowToast('✅ PDF 報告已開啟！請選擇「列印」→「另存PDF」'); } function expExportGrowthPDF() { expExportPDF(); } // ── Text summary ────────────────────────────────────── function expExportText() { const name = babyData.name || '寶寶'; const now = new Date(); const pad2 = n=>String(n).padStart(2,'0'); const today = `${now.getFullYear()}-${pad2(now.getMonth()+1)}-${pad2(now.getDate())}`; const milkToday = typeof milkLogs !=='undefined'? milkLogs.filter(l=>l.ts&&new Date(l.ts).toISOString().slice(0,10)===today):[]; const slToday = typeof slLogs !=='undefined'? slLogs.filter(l=>l.startMs&&new Date(l.startMs).toISOString().slice(0,10)===today):[]; const dToday = typeof diaperLogs!=='undefined'? diaperLogs.filter(l=>l.dateStr===today):[]; const milkCC = milkToday.filter(l=>l.type==='bottle').reduce((s,l)=>s+(l.cc||0),0); const slMins = slToday.reduce((s,l)=>s+(l.endMs&&l.startMs?(l.endMs-l.startMs)/60000:0),0); const text = `📋 ${name} 今日照護日記（${today}） 🍼 喝奶：共 ${milkToday.length} 次${milkCC?'，瓶餵合計 '+milkCC+'ml':''} 😴 睡眠：共 ${slToday.length} 段，約 ${Math.floor(slMins/60)}h${Math.round(slMins%60)}m 💩 尿布：嗯嗯 ${dToday.filter(l=>l.type==='poop').length} 次、尿尿 ${dToday.filter(l=>l.type==='pee').length} 次 由寶貝日記 APP 產生 🍼`; navigator.clipboard?.writeText(text).then(()=>{ sShowToast('📋 今日摘要已複製到剪貼簿！'); showVoice('📋 今日照護摘要複製好了，快貼給家人看 🌸'); }).catch(()=>{ sShowToast('📋 請手動複製'); }); } // ── Native share ────────────────────────────────────── async function expShareNative() { const csv = expBuildAllCSV(); const name = babyData.name || '寶貝日記'; if (navigator.share) { try { await navigator.share({ title:`${name} 照護紀錄`, text: csv.slice(0,1000)+'...' }); } catch(e) { navigator.clipboard?.writeText(csv); sShowToast('已複製到剪貼簿！'); } } else { navigator.clipboard?.writeText(csv); sShowToast('📋 資料已複製到剪貼簿！'); } } // ── Backup / Restore ────────────────────────────────── function expBackupAll() { expShowProgress('💾','備份資料','收集所有紀錄中…'); const data = { version: '1.0', exportDate: new Date().toISOString(), babyData, milkLogs: typeof milkLogs !=='undefined'?milkLogs:[], slLogs: typeof slLogs !=='undefined'?slLogs:[], diaperLogs: typeof diaperLogs !=='undefined'?diaperLogs:[], careLogs: typeof careLogs !=='undefined'?careLogs:[], growthLogs: typeof growthLogs !=='undefined'?growthLogs:[], vaxRecords: typeof vaxRecords !=='undefined'?vaxRecords:[], bgtExpenses: typeof bgtExpenses !=='undefined'?bgtExpenses:[], illEpisodes: typeof illEpisodes !=='undefined'?illEpisodes:[], illFeverLogs:typeof illFeverLogs!=='undefined'?illFeverLogs:[], illMeds: typeof illMeds !=='undefined'?illMeds:[], sTrials: typeof sTrials !=='undefined'?sTrials:[], outActivities:typeof outActivities!=='undefined'?outActivities:[], badgeRecords:typeof badgeRecords!=='undefined'?badgeRecords:{}, toothRecords:typeof toothRecords!=='undefined'?toothRecords:{}, invItems: typeof invItems !=='undefined'?invItems:[], szWardrobeItems:typeof szWardrobeItems!=='undefined'?szWardrobeItems:[], szMeasurements: typeof szMeasurements !=='undefined'?szMeasurements:[], }; const json = JSON.stringify(data, null, 2); const blob = new Blob([json], {type:'application/json'}); const name = babyData.name || '寶貝日記'; const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10); expDownload(blob, `${name}_備份_${today}.json`); setTimeout(()=>{ document.getElementById('exp-progress-modal').classList.remove('open'); expLastExport = new Date().toLocaleDateString('zh-TW'); document.getElementById('exp-last-export').textContent = expLastExport; sShowToast('✅ 備份成功！JSON 檔案已下載。'); showVoice('💾 所有資料備份完成！記得存好這個檔案 🔐'); if ('vibrate' in navigator) navigator.vibrate([80,40,80,40,150]); }, 800); expAnimateProgress(100); } function expRestoreFromFile(input) { const file = input?.files?.[0]; if (!file) return; const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = e => { try { const data = JSON.parse(e.target.result); if (!data.version || !data.babyData) { sShowToast('❌ 無效的備份檔案！'); return; } customConfirm('確定還原？這將覆蓋所有現有資料，無法復原！', () => { // Restore all data if (data.babyData) Object.assign(babyData, data.babyData); if (data.milkLogs) milkLogs = data.milkLogs; if (data.slLogs) slLogs = data.slLogs; if (data.diaperLogs) diaperLogs = data.diaperLogs; if (data.careLogs) careLogs = data.careLogs; if (data.growthLogs) growthLogs = data.growthLogs; if (data.vaxRecords) vaxRecords = data.vaxRecords; if (data.bgtExpenses) bgtExpenses = data.bgtExpenses; if (data.illEpisodes) illEpisodes = data.illEpisodes; if (data.illFeverLogs) illFeverLogs= data.illFeverLogs; if (data.illMeds) illMeds = data.illMeds; if (data.sTrials) sTrials = data.sTrials; if (data.outActivities) outActivities= data.outActivities; if (data.badgeRecords) badgeRecords= data.badgeRecords; if (data.toothRecords) toothRecords= data.toothRecords; if (data.invItems) invItems = data.invItems; if (data.szWardrobeItems) szWardrobeItems = data.szWardrobeItems; if (data.szMeasurements) szMeasurements = data.szMeasurements; updateHomeDisplay(); dbSave(); sShowToast('✅ 資料還原成功！'); showVoice('🎉 備份還原完成！所有紀錄都回來了！'); }, '📥'); } catch(err) { sShowToast('❌ 讀取備份失敗：'+err.message); } }; reader.readAsText(file); } // ── Preview ─────────────────────────────────────────── function expRebuildPreviewTabs() { const el = document.getElementById('exp-preview-tabs'); if (!el) return; const cats = [{id:'milk',em:'🍼'},{id:'sleep',em:'😴'},{id:'diaper',em:'💩'},{id:'growth',em:'📈'}]; el.innerHTML = cats.map(c => `` ).join(''); } function expSetPreviewCat(id) { expPreviewCat=id; expRebuildPreviewTabs(); expRenderPreview(); } function expRenderPreview() { const el = document.getElementById('exp-preview-content'); if (!el) return; const pad2 = n=>String(n).padStart(2,'0'); const fmtTs = ts => { const d=new Date(ts); return `${d.getMonth()+1}/${d.getDate()} ${pad2(d.getHours())}:${pad2(d.getMinutes())}`; }; let html = ''; if (expPreviewCat==='milk' && typeof milkLogs!=='undefined') { const rows = milkLogs.filter(l=>l.ts&&expTsInRange(l.ts)).slice(0,10); html = `${rows.map(l=>``).join('')}
時間類型CC
${fmtTs(l.ts)}${l.type==='breast'?'親餵':'瓶餵'}${l.cc||'--'}
`; } else if (expPreviewCat==='sleep' && typeof slLogs!=='undefined') { const rows = slLogs.filter(l=>l.startMs&&expTsInRange(l.startMs)).slice(0,10); html = `${rows.map(l=>{const d=l.endMs&&l.startMs?Math.round((l.endMs-l.startMs)/60000)+'m':'計時中';return``;}).join('')}
開始類型時長
${fmtTs(l.startMs)}${l.type==='nap'?'小睡':'夜眠'}${d}
`; } else if (expPreviewCat==='diaper' && typeof diaperLogs!=='undefined') { const rows = diaperLogs.filter(l=>l.ts&&expTsInRange(l.ts)).slice(0,10); html = `${rows.map(l=>``).join('')}
時間類型
${fmtTs(l.ts)}${l.type==='poop'?'嗯嗯':'尿尿'}
`; } else if (expPreviewCat==='growth' && typeof growthLogs!=='undefined') { const rows = growthLogs.filter(l=>expInRange(l.date)).slice(0,10); html = `${rows.map(l=>``).join('')}
日期體重身高
${l.date}${l.weight||'--'}kg${l.height||'--'}cm
`; } el.innerHTML = html || '
此範圍內沒有資料
'; } // ── Helper: download blob ───────────────────────────── function expDownload(blob, filename) { const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob); const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = url; a.download = filename; document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); document.body.removeChild(a); setTimeout(()=>URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 2000); } // ── Progress animation ──────────────────────────────── function expShowProgress(icon, title, desc) { document.getElementById('exp-prog-icon').textContent = icon; document.getElementById('exp-prog-title').textContent = title; document.getElementById('exp-prog-desc').textContent = desc; document.getElementById('exp-prog-bar').style.width = '0%'; document.getElementById('exp-prog-pct').textContent = '0%'; document.getElementById('exp-progress-modal').classList.add('open'); } function expAnimateProgress(target) { return new Promise(resolve => { let cur = parseInt(document.getElementById('exp-prog-bar').style.width)||0; const step = () => { cur = Math.min(cur+5, target); document.getElementById('exp-prog-bar').style.width = cur+'%'; document.getElementById('exp-prog-pct').textContent = cur+'%'; if (cur{ if(l.ts) allDates.add(new Date(l.ts).toISOString().slice(0,10)); }); if (typeof slLogs !=='undefined') slLogs.forEach(l=>{ if(l.startMs) allDates.add(new Date(l.startMs).toISOString().slice(0,10)); }); document.getElementById('exp-days-tracked').textContent = allDates.size; // Data size estimate const kb = Math.round(total*0.2); document.getElementById('exp-data-size').textContent = kb<1024 ? kb+'KB' : (kb/1024).toFixed(1)+'MB'; if (expLastExport) document.getElementById('exp-last-export').textContent = expLastExport; } // ===================================================== // OUTDOOR RECOMMENDATIONS + REAL TAIWAN MAP // ===================================================== const OUT_REC_FILTERS = [ {id:'indoor', em:'🏠', name:'室內', group:'env'}, {id:'outdoor', em:'🌳', name:'室外', group:'env'}, {id:'free', em:'💰', name:'免費', group:'cost'}, {id:'paid', em:'🎫', name:'付費', group:'cost'}, {id:'baby_ok', em:'👶', name:'母嬰友善', group:'baby'}, {id:'bf', em:'🤱', name:'哺乳室', group:'baby'}, {id:'nature', em:'🌿', name:'自然生態', group:'type'}, {id:'museum', em:'🏛️', name:'博物館', group:'type'}, {id:'park', em:'🌸', name:'公園', group:'type'}, {id:'zoo', em:'🐼', name:'動物園', group:'type'}, {id:'pool', em:'🏊', name:'水上樂園', group:'type'}, {id:'farm', em:'🌾', name:'農場體驗', group:'type'}, ]; let outRecSelFilters = new Set(['baby_ok']); let outRecAgeFilter = 0; // months, 0=all // Curated Taiwan baby-friendly spots database const TW_SPOTS = [ {name:'台北市立動物園', county:'台北市', cats:['outdoor','paid','baby_ok','zoo'], age:0, desc:'全台最大動物園，推車友善，設有哺乳室與親子廁所'}, {name:'國立自然科學博物館', county:'台中市', cats:['indoor','paid','baby_ok','museum'], age:6, desc:'互動展示豐富，推車可進入，館內哺乳室完善'}, {name:'花博公園', county:'台北市', cats:['outdoor','free','baby_ok','park'], age:0, desc:'腹地廣大，草地適合寶寶爬行，多處哺乳空間'}, {name:'台南奇美博物館', county:'台南市', cats:['indoor','free','baby_ok','museum'], age:3, desc:'建築優美，館內設施完善，適合親子參觀'}, {name:'宜蘭傳藝中心', county:'宜蘭縣', cats:['outdoor','paid','baby_ok','museum'], age:3, desc:'台灣傳統文化展示，有哺乳室，園區推車友善'}, {name:'新北市立圖書館', county:'新北市', cats:['indoor','free','baby_ok','museum'], age:0, desc:'兒童閱覽區寬敞，定期親子活動，哺乳室完備'}, {name:'大安森林公園', county:'台北市', cats:['outdoor','free','baby_ok','park'], age:0, desc:'市中心綠洲，適合散步，空氣好，草地廣闊'}, {name:'桃園農業博覽會農場', county:'桃園市', cats:['outdoor','paid','baby_ok','farm'], age:6, desc:'認識農業，戶外空間大，多項親子互動體驗'}, {name:'新竹市立動物園', county:'新竹市', cats:['outdoor','free','baby_ok','zoo'], age:0, desc:'免費入場全台唯一，小而美，推車友善'}, {name:'台中秋紅谷公園', county:'台中市', cats:['outdoor','free','baby_ok','park'], age:0, desc:'湖畔公園，環境幽靜，適合帶嬰兒車漫步'}, {name:'高雄科學工藝博物館', county:'高雄市', cats:['indoor','paid','baby_ok','museum'], age:6, desc:'互動展示多，兒童科學展區，哺乳室完善'}, {name:'花蓮遠雄海洋公園', county:'花蓮縣', cats:['outdoor','paid','baby_ok','pool'], age:12, desc:'海豚秀、水上設施，有哺乳室，親子設施完整'}, {name:'台北市兒童新樂園', county:'台北市', cats:['outdoor','paid','baby_ok','park'], age:12, desc:'兒童遊樂設施，MRT直達，哺乳室與尿布台完備'}, {name:'南投清境農場', county:'南投縣', cats:['outdoor','paid','baby_ok','farm'], age:6, desc:'高山草原，可餵羊，涼爽氣候，設施完善'}, {name:'台南四草綠色隧道', county:'台南市', cats:['outdoor','paid','baby_ok','nature'], age:3, desc:'搭船穿越紅樹林，自然生態體驗，嬰幼兒適合'}, {name:'基隆潮境公園', county:'基隆市', cats:['outdoor','free','baby_ok','nature'], age:0, desc:'海邊公園，草地廣闊，觀海平台，周邊設施完善'}, {name:'台北101觀景台', county:'台北市', cats:['indoor','paid','baby_ok','museum'], age:0, desc:'俯瞰台北，推車友善，電梯無障礙，哺乳室完備'}, {name:'嘉義農業試驗所', county:'嘉義縣', cats:['outdoor','free','baby_ok','farm'], age:0, desc:'假日限定開放，大草坪，自然生態，免費入場'}, {name:'台中國立美術館', county:'台中市', cats:['indoor','free','baby_ok','museum'], age:0, desc:'廣大草坪，館內推車可進入，哺乳室完善'}, {name:'屏東海生館', county:'屏東縣', cats:['indoor','paid','baby_ok','zoo'], age:0, desc:'全台最大水族館，海底隧道，親子友善設施完整'}, ]; function outInitRecFilters() { const el = document.getElementById('rec-filter-chips'); if (!el) return; // Age filter const ageM = babyData.birthday ? Math.floor((Date.now()-new Date(babyData.birthday))/(30.44*86400000)) : 0; outRecAgeFilter = ageM; const groups = [ {label:'環境', ids:['indoor','outdoor']}, {label:'費用', ids:['free','paid']}, {label:'嬰幼兒', ids:['baby_ok','bf']}, {label:'類型', ids:['nature','museum','park','zoo','pool','farm']}, ]; el.innerHTML = `
寶寶月齡：${ageM}個月　自動過濾不適齡景點
` + groups.map(g => `
${g.label}
` + g.ids.map(id => { const f = OUT_REC_FILTERS.find(x=>x.id===id); const on = outRecSelFilters.has(id); return `
${f.em} ${f.name}
`; }).join('') ).join(''); } function outToggleFilter(id) { if (outRecSelFilters.has(id)) outRecSelFilters.delete(id); else outRecSelFilters.add(id); outInitRecFilters(); } function outSearchRecommend() { const el = document.getElementById('rec-results-area'); if (!el) return; el.innerHTML = `
🔍
搜尋中…
`; setTimeout(() => { const ageM = outRecAgeFilter; const filters = outRecSelFilters; let results = TW_SPOTS.filter(spot => { if (spot.age > ageM) return false; // age check if (filters.size === 0) return true; // Check: if env filter set, spot must match one of them const envSel = ['indoor','outdoor'].filter(x=>filters.has(x)); if (envSel.length && !envSel.some(x=>spot.cats.includes(x))) return false; const costSel = ['free','paid'].filter(x=>filters.has(x)); if (costSel.length && !costSel.some(x=>spot.cats.includes(x))) return false; const typeSel = ['nature','museum','park','zoo','pool','farm'].filter(x=>filters.has(x)); if (typeSel.length && !typeSel.some(x=>spot.cats.includes(x))) return false; if (filters.has('baby_ok') && !spot.cats.includes('baby_ok')) return false; if (filters.has('bf') && !spot.cats.includes('bf')) return false; return true; }); if (!results.length) { el.innerHTML = `
😅
沒有符合條件的景點
試試減少篩選條件
`; return; } el.innerHTML = `
找到 ${results.length} 個推薦景點 ✨
` + results.map(spot => { const tags = spot.cats.map(id => { const f = OUT_REC_FILTERS.find(x=>x.id===id); return f ? `${f.em}${f.name}` : ''; }).join(''); return `
🌟
${spot.name}
📍 ${spot.county} · 建議月齡 ${spot.age}M+
${tags}
${spot.desc}
`; }).join(''); }, 600); } function outAddFromRec(name, county) { const now = new Date(); const pad = n=>String(n).padStart(2,'0'); outActivities.unshift({ id: Date.now(), cat:'park', place: name, county, date: `${now.getFullYear()}-${pad(now.getMonth()+1)}-${pad(now.getDate())}`, weather:'sunny', mood:'happy', note:'由景點推薦加入', lat:0, lng:0 }); sShowToast('✅ ' + name + ' 已加入足跡！'); showVoice('🌟 ' + name + ' 加入足跡囉！' + (babyData.name||'寶寶') + ' 好幸運 🌸'); if('vibrate' in navigator) navigator.vibrate(50); } // ===== NEW FEATURE DATA ===== let fsMealLogs = []; // food stage meal logs let fsCurrentStage = 'puree'; // puree|mash|finger|self let fsFoodTags = []; // current meal food tags let fsRating = 1; // current star rating let glCustomItems = []; // grocery list custom items let glGeneratedItems = [];// auto-generated grocery items let diaryEntries = []; // growth diary entries let diaryPhoto = null; // current diary photo base64 let diaryCurrentMood = 'happy'; let diarySelTags = []; // selected tags for current entry let boardMessages = []; // family message board let boardPosterName = ''; // current poster let outChecklistItems = []; // custom checklist items let outChecklistChecked = {}; // {itemId: true/false} // ===== FOOD STAGE FUNCTIONS ===== const FS_STAGES = { puree: {label:'泥狀食物期', color:'#F0B040', age:'4–8M'}, mash: {label:'軟爛期', color:'#E8C000', age:'7–9M'}, finger: {label:'手指食物期', color:'#45C070', age:'9–12M'}, self: {label:'自主進食期', color:'#5080D0', age:'12M+'} }; function fsInit() { // Set current stage from baby age const age = babyData.birthday ? calcAge(babyData.birthday).months : 0; if (age < 7) fsCurrentStage = 'puree'; else if (age < 9) fsCurrentStage = 'mash'; else if (age < 12) fsCurrentStage = 'finger'; else fsCurrentStage = 'self'; fsUpdateStageUI(); fsRenderQuickFoods(); fsRenderHistory(); // Set default time to now const now = new Date(); const pad = n => String(n).padStart(2,'0'); const dtEl = document.getElementById('fs-meal-time'); if (dtEl) { dtEl.value = `${now.getFullYear()}-${pad(now.getMonth()+1)}-${pad(now.getDate())}T${pad(now.getHours())}:${pad(now.getMinutes())}`; } } function fsSelectStage(stage, el) { fsCurrentStage = stage; fsUpdateStageUI(); dbAutosave(); } function fsUpdateStageUI() { ['puree','mash','finger','self'].forEach(s => { const card = document.getElementById('fsc-'+s); const chk = document.getElementById('fsc-check-'+s); if (!card) return; const isSelected = s === fsCurrentStage; const stageInfo = FS_STAGES[s]; card.style.border = `2.5px solid ${isSelected ? stageInfo.color : 'transparent'}`; card.style.boxShadow = isSelected ? `0 4px 16px ${stageInfo.color}40` : ''; if (chk) chk.innerHTML = isSelected ? `✅` : ''; }); } function fsAddFood() { const inp = document.getElementById('fs-food-inp'); if (!inp || !inp.value.trim()) return; const food = inp.value.trim(); if (!fsFoodTags.includes(food)) fsFoodTags.push(food); inp.value = ''; fsRenderFoodTags(); } function fsRenderFoodTags() { const el = document.getElementById('fs-food-tags'); if (!el) return; el.innerHTML = fsFoodTags.map((f,i) => ` ${f} ✕ `).join(''); } function fsRemoveFood(idx) { fsFoodTags.splice(idx,1); fsRenderFoodTags(); } function fsRate(n) { fsRating = n; const stars = document.querySelectorAll('#fs-rating-stars span'); stars.forEach((s,i) => s.style.opacity = i < n ? '1' : '0.35'); } function fsRenderQuickFoods() { const el = document.getElementById('fs-quick-foods'); if (!el) return; // Pull from suppLogs / solids library const allFoods = (typeof sTrials !== 'undefined' ? sTrials : []).map(t => t.name).filter(Boolean); const stageFoods = { puree: ['南瓜泥','地瓜泥','米糊','馬鈴薯泥','蘋果泥','香蕉泥','豌豆泥','胡蘿蔔泥'], mash: ['軟爛米飯','雞肉泥','豆腐','蒸蛋','地瓜塊','南瓜塊','花椰菜','粥'], finger: ['軟吐司條','香蕉條','煮軟的胡蘿蔔條','豆腐塊','軟水果條','起司','麵條','雞肉條'], self: ['一般米飯','蒸魚','蔬菜','水果塊','麵食','湯品','雞蛋','豆類'] }; const suggestions = [...new Set([...allFoods.slice(0,5), ...stageFoods[fsCurrentStage].slice(0,8)])]; el.innerHTML = suggestions.map(f => `` ).join(''); } function fsFoodQuick(food) { if (!fsFoodTags.includes(food)) { fsFoodTags.push(food); fsRenderFoodTags(); } } function fsSaveMeal() { const timeEl = document.getElementById('fs-meal-time'); const amtEl = document.getElementById('fs-amount'); const noteEl = document.getElementById('fs-note'); if (!timeEl || !timeEl.value) { sShowToast('請填寫用餐時間！'); return; } if (!fsFoodTags.length) { sShowToast('請至少加入一種食材！'); return; } const rec = { id: Date.now(), time: timeEl.value, stage: fsCurrentStage, foods: [...fsFoodTags], amount: parseFloat(amtEl?.value) || 0, rating: fsRating, note: noteEl?.value.trim() || '' }; fsMealLogs.unshift(rec); fsFoodTags = []; if (amtEl) amtEl.value = ''; if (noteEl) noteEl.value = ''; fsRating = 1; fsRate(1); fsRenderFoodTags(); fsRenderHistory(); dbAutosave(); sShowToast('✅ 用餐紀錄儲存！'); showVoice('🥕 ' + rec.foods.join('、') + ' 記錄好囉！寶寶吃得好棒 🌟'); } function fsRenderHistory() { const el = document.getElementById('fs-meal-history'); if (!el) return; if (!fsMealLogs.length) { el.innerHTML = '
還沒有用餐紀錄
記錄第一餐吧！
'; return; } const stg = FS_STAGES; el.innerHTML = fsMealLogs.slice(0,20).map(r => { const s = stg[r.stage] || {label:r.stage, color:'#AAA'}; const stars = '⭐'.repeat(r.rating); const t = r.time ? r.time.replace('T',' ').slice(0,16) : ''; return `
🥕
${r.foods.join('・')} ${s.label}
${t} ${r.amount ? '・'+r.amount+'ml' : ''}
${stars}
${r.note ? `
${r.note}
` : ''}
🗑️
`; }).join(''); } function fsDeleteMeal(id) { customConfirm('刪除這筆用餐紀錄？', () => { fsMealLogs = fsMealLogs.filter(r => r.id !== id); fsRenderHistory(); dbAutosave(); sShowToast('🗑️ 已刪除'); }, '🥕'); } // ===== GROCERY LIST FUNCTIONS ===== const GL_TIPS = { puree: '選擇新鮮、無添加的食材。優先選單一成分（純南瓜、純地瓜），方便追蹤過敏。可批量製作後冷凍，每格約 1 湯匙份量。', mash: '可開始引入更多種類，注意選擇軟嫩的食材。雞腿肉比雞胸肉更嫩，豆腐選板豆腐更適合。', finger: '切成寶寶小拳頭長度的條狀，直徑約手指粗細。測試方法：食材輕壓即扁即可。', self: '準備家庭式餐食，少鹽少糖。嘗試讓寶寶與家人同桌共食，建立良好飲食習慣。' }; const GL_BASE_ITEMS = { puree: [ {name:'南瓜', em:'🎃', cat:'蔬菜', qty:'1/4 顆', note:'蒸熟打泥'}, {name:'地瓜', em:'🍠', cat:'蔬菜', qty:'1條', note:'烤熟搗泥'}, {name:'馬鈴薯', em:'🥔', cat:'蔬菜', qty:'2顆', note:'蒸熟打泥'}, {name:'胡蘿蔔', em:'🥕', cat:'蔬菜', qty:'2根', note:'蒸熟打泥'}, {name:'蘋果', em:'🍎', cat:'水果', qty:'2顆', note:'蒸熟打泥'}, {name:'香蕉', em:'🍌', cat:'水果', qty:'1串', note:'直接搗泥'}, {name:'米', em:'🌾', cat:'主食', qty:'半杯', note:'煮成10倍粥'}, {name:'嬰兒米精', em:'🥣', cat:'主食', qty:'1盒', note:'強化鐵質'}, ], mash: [ {name:'雞腿肉', em:'🍗', cat:'蛋白質', qty:'1支', note:'燉爛'}, {name:'板豆腐', em:'🫛', cat:'蛋白質', qty:'1盒', note:'蒸熟碾碎'}, {name:'雞蛋', em:'🥚', cat:'蛋白質', qty:'6顆', note:'蒸蛋、水煮'}, {name:'花椰菜', em:'🥦', cat:'蔬菜', qty:'半棵', note:'蒸軟切碎'}, {name:'菠菜', em:'🥬', cat:'蔬菜', qty:'1把', note:'燙軟切碎'}, {name:'米', em:'🌾', cat:'主食', qty:'1杯', note:'煮成7倍粥'}, ], finger: [ {name:'吐司', em:'🍞', cat:'主食', qty:'1條', note:'切條蒸軟'}, {name:'雞胸肉', em:'🍗', cat:'蛋白質', qty:'200g', note:'切條水煮'}, {name:'香蕉', em:'🍌', cat:'水果', qty:'1串', note:'切條'}, {name:'酪梨', em:'🥑', cat:'水果', qty:'1顆', note:'切條軟嫩'}, {name:'軟起司', em:'🧀', cat:'乳製品', qty:'1包', note:'剝成小塊'}, {name:'花椰菜', em:'🥦', cat:'蔬菜', qty:'半棵', note:'煮超軟'}, {name:'麵條', em:'🍝', cat:'主食', qty:'1包', note:'煮軟剪短'}, ], self: [ {name:'白米', em:'🌾', cat:'主食', qty:'1kg', note:'煮軟一點'}, {name:'雞腿', em:'🍗', cat:'蛋白質', qty:'2支', note:'去骨去皮'}, {name:'鮭魚', em:'🐟', cat:'蛋白質', qty:'1片', note:'去刺蒸熟'}, {name:'雞蛋', em:'🥚', cat:'蛋白質', qty:'1盒', note:'各種做法'}, {name:'綜合蔬菜', em:'🥦', cat:'蔬菜', qty:'適量', note:'切小塊煮軟'}, {name:'豆腐', em:'🫛', cat:'蛋白質', qty:'2盒', note:''}, {name:'水果', em:'🍎', cat:'水果', qty:'適量', note:'切小塊'}, ] }; function glInit() { const age = babyData.birthday ? calcAge(babyData.birthday).months : 0; const stage = age < 7 ? 'puree' : age < 9 ? 'mash' : age < 12 ? 'finger' : 'self'; const ageDescEl = document.getElementById('gl-age-desc'); if (ageDescEl) ageDescEl.textContent = `${babyData.name||'寶寶'}目前 ${age} 個月大・${FS_STAGES[stage]?.label||stage}階段`; const tipsEl = document.getElementById('gl-tips-text'); if (tipsEl) tipsEl.textContent = GL_TIPS[stage] || ''; glRenderList(); } function glGenerate() { const age = babyData.birthday ? calcAge(babyData.birthday).months : 0; const stage = age < 7 ? 'puree' : age < 9 ? 'mash' : age < 12 ? 'finger' : 'self'; glGeneratedItems = (GL_BASE_ITEMS[stage] || []).map((item,i) => ({...item, id:'gl_gen_'+i, checked:false})); glRenderList(); sShowToast('✅ 依月齡生成本週清單！'); showVoice('🛒 本週買菜清單已生成！共 ' + glGeneratedItems.length + ' 項食材 🌟'); } function glAddCustom() { const inp = document.getElementById('gl-custom-inp'); if (!inp || !inp.value.trim()) return; glCustomItems.push({id:'gl_c_'+Date.now(), name:inp.value.trim(), em:'🛒', cat:'自訂', qty:'', note:'', checked:false}); inp.value = ''; glRenderList(); dbAutosave(); } function glRenderList() { const el = document.getElementById('gl-list-items'); if (!el) return; const all = [...glGeneratedItems, ...glCustomItems]; if (!all.length) { el.innerHTML = '
點擊「生成本週清單」自動生成
或手動新增採購品項
'; const prog = document.getElementById('chk-prog-label'); if (prog) prog.textContent = '0 / 0'; return; } const done = all.filter(i=>i.checked).length; const progLabel = document.getElementById('gl-prog-label'); if (progLabel) progLabel.textContent = done + ' / ' + all.length; // group by cat const cats = {}; all.forEach(item => { if(!cats[item.cat]) cats[item.cat]=[]; cats[item.cat].push(item); }); el.innerHTML = Object.entries(cats).map(([cat, items]) => `
— ${cat} —
${items.map(item => `
${item.em}
${item.name}
${item.qty ? `
${item.qty}${item.note?' · '+item.note:''}
` : ''}
${item.checked?'✓':''}
`).join('')}
`).join(''); } function glToggle(id) { const item = [...glGeneratedItems, ...glCustomItems].find(i=>i.id===id); if (item) { item.checked = !item.checked; glRenderList(); dbAutosave(); } } function glCheckAll() { glGeneratedItems.forEach(i=>i.checked=true); glCustomItems.forEach(i=>i.checked=true); glRenderList(); dbAutosave(); } function glClearChecked() { glGeneratedItems = glGeneratedItems.filter(i=>!i.checked); glCustomItems = glCustomItems.filter(i=>!i.checked); glRenderList(); dbAutosave(); sShowToast('✅ 已清除完成品項'); } function glShareList() { const all = [...glGeneratedItems, ...glCustomItems].filter(i=>!i.checked); if (!all.length) { sShowToast('清單已全部完成！'); return; } const text = '🛒 本週買菜清單\n' + all.map(i=>`□ ${i.em} ${i.name}${i.qty?' ('+i.qty+')':''}`).join('\n'); if (navigator.share) { navigator.share({title:'買菜清單', text}); } else { navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(()=>sShowToast('📋 清單已複製！')); } } // ===== RECIPE FUNCTIONS ===== let recCurrentStage = 'all'; const BUILT_IN_RECIPES = { puree: [ {name:'南瓜泥', em:'🎃', time:'15分鐘', diff:'★☆☆', ingr:'南瓜 50g', steps:'南瓜去皮切塊→蒸15分→打泥過篩。可加少量母乳或配方奶調稀。', tip:'第一次嘗試時從2茶匙開始，觀察3天。'}, {name:'地瓜蘋果泥', em:'🍠🍎', time:'20分鐘', diff:'★☆☆', ingr:'地瓜30g・蘋果20g', steps:'地瓜蒸熟→蘋果去皮蒸軟→一起打成泥。', tip:'天然甜味寶寶超愛！'}, {name:'10倍米糊', em:'🌾', time:'30分鐘', diff:'★☆☆', ingr:'白米1大匙', steps:'米洗淨加10倍水→小火煮30分→過篩取汁。', tip:'第一口副食品的最佳選擇。'}, ], mash: [ {name:'雞肉蔬菜粥', em:'🍗🥕', time:'40分鐘', diff:'★★☆', ingr:'米1/4杯・雞腿肉30g・胡蘿蔔10g', steps:'米加7倍水煮軟→雞肉燙熟切碎→胡蘿蔔蒸軟→拌在一起煮5分鐘。', tip:'均衡營養！注意食物需可用舌頭壓碎。'}, {name:'嫩豆腐蛋黃', em:'🫛🥚', time:'10分鐘', diff:'★☆☆', ingr:'板豆腐30g・蛋黃1個', steps:'豆腐蒸3分鐘→蛋黃水煮後碾碎→混合即可。', tip:'蛋黃富含鐵質，6個月後可開始嘗試。'}, {name:'蒸蛋', em:'🥚', time:'15分鐘', diff:'★☆☆', ingr:'雞蛋1顆・溫水90ml', steps:'蛋打散加溫水攪勻→過篩→水開後蒸12分。', tip:'嫩滑好消化，可加少量南瓜泥增色。'}, ], finger: [ {name:'地瓜條', em:'🍠', time:'25分鐘', diff:'★☆☆', ingr:'地瓜1條', steps:'地瓜去皮切1cm條→蒸20分到軟→放涼。', tip:'輕壓即扁才安全！長度約寶寶手指長。'}, {name:'軟吐司條', em:'🍞', time:'5分鐘', diff:'★☆☆', ingr:'吐司1片', steps:'去邊→蒸1–2分鐘→切條。', tip:'最快的手指食物！蒸過更軟更安全。'}, {name:'香蕉雞蛋鬆餅', em:'🍌🥚', time:'20分鐘', diff:'★★☆', ingr:'香蕉半根・雞蛋1顆', steps:'香蕉搗泥→加蛋打勻→不沾鍋小火煎成小圓餅。', tip:'天然甜味無需加糖！切成條狀讓寶寶抓。'}, ], self: [ {name:'滑蛋飯', em:'🥚🍚', time:'15分鐘', diff:'★★☆', ingr:'米飯1碗・雞蛋2顆・青菜適量', steps:'蛋打散炒半熟→加米飯拌勻→加青菜炒熟。', tip:'與家人同食！建議少鹽。'}, {name:'清蒸鮭魚', em:'🐟', time:'20分鐘', diff:'★☆☆', ingr:'鮭魚1片', steps:'鮭魚去刺→蒸12分→挑碎即可。', tip:'DHA來源豐富，每週2–3次。'}, {name:'豆腐蔬菜湯', em:'🫛🥦', time:'25分鐘', diff:'★☆☆', ingr:'板豆腐1盒・蔬菜適量', steps:'蔬菜洗切→加水煮軟→加豆腐再煮5分。', tip:'可放在飯上讓寶寶自己挖著吃。'}, ] }; // ── Recipe link saved items ─────────────────────────── let recSavedLinks = []; // {id,url,name,cat,tags,note,platform,savedAt} let recLinkSelCat = 'puree'; let recFilterCatCur = 'all'; let recCurTab = 'saved'; let recEditLinkId = null; const REC_CAT_MAP = { all:'全部', puree:'🥣 泥狀', mash:'🍲 軟爛', finger:'👆 手指食物', self:'🍽️ 自主進食', ingredient:'🥕 食材', snack:'🍪 點心', other:'📌 其他' }; function recDetectPlatform(url) { if (!url) return ''; if (url.includes('facebook.com') || url.includes('fb.watch')) return '📘 Facebook'; if (url.includes('instagram.com') || url.includes('instagr.am')) return '📸 Instagram'; if (url.includes('threads.net')) return '🧵 Threads'; if (url.includes('youtube.com') || url.includes('youtu.be')) return '▶️ YouTube'; if (url.includes('tiktok.com')) return '🎵 TikTok'; if (url.includes('twitter.com') || url.includes('x.com')) return '🐦 X (Twitter)'; return '🔗 網頁連結'; } function recPreviewLink() { const url = document.getElementById('rec-link-url')?.value.trim() || ''; const badge = document.getElementById('rec-link-platform-badge'); if (badge) badge.textContent = url ? recDetectPlatform(url) : ''; } function recLinkSetCat(cat, btn) { recLinkSelCat = cat; document.querySelectorAll('#rec-link-cat-chips .rec-cat-chip').forEach(b => { const isSel = b.dataset.cat === cat; b.style.background = isSel ? '#F0B040' : 'white'; b.style.borderColor = isSel ? '#F0B040' : '#E0C080'; b.style.color = isSel ? 'white' : '#8A6000'; }); } function recFilterCat(cat, btn) { recFilterCatCur = cat; document.querySelectorAll('#rec-cat-filter .rec-cat-btn').forEach(b => { const isSel = b.dataset.cat === cat; b.style.background = isSel ? '#F0B040' : 'white'; b.style.borderColor = isSel ? '#F0B040' : '#E0C080'; b.style.color = isSel ? 'white' : '#8A6000'; }); recRenderLinks(); } function recSwitchTab(tab) { recCurTab = tab; document.getElementById('rec-panel-saved').style.display = tab==='saved' ? '' : 'none'; document.getElementById('rec-panel-ai').style.display = tab==='ai' ? '' : 'none'; const btnS = document.getElementById('rec-tab-saved'); const btnA = document.getElementById('rec-tab-ai'); if (btnS) { btnS.style.background = tab==='saved'?'white':'transparent'; btnS.style.color=tab==='saved'?'#8A5000':'#A07040'; btnS.style.boxShadow=tab==='saved'?'0 2px 6px rgba(140,80,0,.12)':'none'; } if (btnA) { btnA.style.background = tab==='ai'?'white':'transparent'; btnA.style.color=tab==='ai'?'#8A5000':'#A07040'; btnA.style.boxShadow=tab==='ai'?'0 2px 6px rgba(140,80,0,.12)':'none'; } } function recOpenAddLink(editId) { recEditLinkId = editId || null; const titleEl = document.getElementById('rec-link-modal-title'); if (titleEl) titleEl.textContent = editId ? '✏️ 編輯食譜連結' : '🔖 收藏食譜連結'; if (editId) { const r = recSavedLinks.find(x=>x.id===editId); if (r) { document.getElementById('rec-link-url').value = r.url || ''; document.getElementById('rec-link-name').value = r.name || ''; document.getElementById('rec-link-tags').value = (r.tags||[]).join('、'); document.getElementById('rec-link-note').value = r.note || ''; recLinkSetCat(r.cat || 'puree', null); recPreviewLink(); } } else { document.getElementById('rec-link-url').value = ''; document.getElementById('rec-link-name').value = ''; document.getElementById('rec-link-tags').value = ''; document.getElementById('rec-link-note').value = ''; recLinkSetCat('puree', null); document.getElementById('rec-link-platform-badge').textContent = ''; } const modal = document.getElementById('rec-add-link-modal'); modal.style.opacity='1'; modal.style.pointerEvents='auto'; document.getElementById('rec-add-link-box').style.transform='translateY(0)'; } function recCloseAddLink() { const modal = document.getElementById('rec-add-link-modal'); modal.style.opacity='0'; modal.style.pointerEvents='none'; document.getElementById('rec-add-link-box').style.transform='translateY(100%)'; } function recSaveLink() { const url = document.getElementById('rec-link-url').value.trim(); const name = document.getElementById('rec-link-name').value.trim(); if (!url) { sShowToast('請貼上食譜連結！'); return; } if (!name) { sShowToast('請輸入食譜名稱！'); return; } const tagsRaw = document.getElementById('rec-link-tags').value.trim(); const tags = tagsRaw ? tagsRaw.split(/[，,、\s]+/).filter(Boolean) : []; const note = document.getElementById('rec-link-note').value.trim(); const rec = { id: recEditLinkId || Date.now(), url, name, cat: recLinkSelCat, tags, note, platform: recDetectPlatform(url), savedAt: new Date().toISOString(), }; if (recEditLinkId) { const idx = recSavedLinks.findIndex(x=>x.id===recEditLinkId); if (idx>=0) recSavedLinks[idx] = rec; } else { recSavedLinks.unshift(rec); } recEditLinkId = null; recCloseAddLink(); recRenderLinks(); dbAutosave(); sShowToast('✅ 食譜已收藏！'); showVoice('食譜收藏好了 🍳 點卡片可以直接打開連結！'); } function recDeleteLink(id) { customConfirm('確定刪除這個食譜收藏？', () => { recSavedLinks = recSavedLinks.filter(x=>x.id!==id); recRenderLinks(); dbAutosave(); sShowToast('已刪除'); }, '🗑️'); } function recRenderLinks() { const listEl = document.getElementById('rec-link-list'); const emptyEl = document.getElementById('rec-link-empty'); if (!listEl) return; const q = (document.getElementById('rec-link-search')?.value||'').trim().toLowerCase(); const cat = recFilterCatCur; let items = recSavedLinks.filter(r => { const catOk = cat==='all' || r.cat===cat; const qOk = !q || r.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) || (r.tags||[]).some(t=>t.toLowerCase().includes(q)) || (r.note||'').toLowerCase().includes(q); return catOk && qOk; }); if (!items.length) { listEl.innerHTML=''; if (emptyEl) emptyEl.style.display = recSavedLinks.length===0 ? '' : 'block'; if (emptyEl && recSavedLinks.length>0) { emptyEl.innerHTML=`
🔍
找不到符合的食譜
試試換個分類或清空搜尋
`; } return; } if (emptyEl) emptyEl.style.display='none'; listEl.innerHTML = items.map(r => { const tagHtml = (r.tags||[]).map(t=>`${t}`).join(' '); const catLabel = REC_CAT_MAP[r.cat] || r.cat; return `
${r.name}
${r.platform} · ${catLabel}
${tagHtml ? `
${tagHtml}
` : ''} ${r.note ? `
${r.note}
` : ''}
`; }).join(''); } function recInit() { recRenderLinks(); recSwitchTab('saved'); const all = Object.values(BUILT_IN_RECIPES).flat(); const el = document.getElementById('rec-cards-list'); if (el) el.innerHTML = all.map(r => recCardHTML(r)).join(''); } function recStage(stage, el) { recCurrentStage = stage; document.querySelectorAll('.rec-stage-btn').forEach(b => { b.style.background = 'white'; b.style.color = '#8A6000'; b.style.borderColor = '#E0C080'; }); if (el) { el.style.background = '#F0B040'; el.style.color = 'white'; el.style.borderColor = '#F0B040'; } recRenderCards(); } function recSearch() { const q = document.getElementById('rec-search-inp')?.value.trim().toLowerCase(); if (!q) { recRenderCards(); return; } const el = document.getElementById('rec-cards-list'); if (!el) return; const all = Object.values(BUILT_IN_RECIPES).flat(); const results = all.filter(r => r.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) || r.ingr.toLowerCase().includes(q)); el.innerHTML = results.length ? results.map(r => recCardHTML(r)).join('') : '
沒有找到相關食譜
'; } function recRenderCards() { const el = document.getElementById('rec-cards-list'); if (!el) return; const recipes = recCurrentStage === 'all' ? Object.values(BUILT_IN_RECIPES).flat() : (BUILT_IN_RECIPES[recCurrentStage]||[]); el.innerHTML = recipes.map(r => recCardHTML(r)).join(''); } function recCardHTML(r) { return `
${r.em}
${r.name}
⏱ ${r.time} 難度：${r.diff}
食材：
${r.ingr}
做法：
${r.steps}
💡 ${r.tip}
`; } function recAIRecommend() { const el = document.getElementById('rec-cards-list'); if (!el) return; el.innerHTML = '
⏳
AI 正在為您推薦食譜...
'; const age = babyData.birthday ? calcAge(babyData.birthday).months : 6; const stage = age < 7 ? 'puree' : age < 9 ? 'mash' : age < 12 ? 'finger' : 'self'; const tried = (typeof sTrials !== 'undefined' ? sTrials : []).slice(0,5).map(t=>t.name).join('、'); fetch('https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages', { method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body: JSON.stringify({ model:'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens:600, messages:[{role:'user', content:`寶寶${age}個月大（${FS_STAGES[stage]?.label||stage}），${tried?'已嘗試過：'+tried+'。':''}請推薦3道本週適合的副食品食譜（繁體中文），每道包含：食譜名稱、主要食材、簡短做法（2-3步驟）、注意事項。格式：JSON陣列，每項有name,em(emoji),ingr,steps,tip字段。只回傳JSON，不要其他文字。`}] }) }).then(r=>r.json()).then(d=>{ try { const text = d.content?.find(c=>c.type==='text')?.text||'[]'; const clean = text.replace(/```json|```/g,'').trim(); const recs = JSON.parse(clean); el.innerHTML = `
✨ AI 為 ${babyData.name||'寶寶'} 推薦的本週食譜
` + recs.map(r=>recCardHTML(r)).join(''); } catch(e) { recRenderCards(); } }).catch(()=>{ recRenderCards(); sShowToast('請稍後再試'); }); } // ===== GROWTH DIARY FUNCTIONS ===== function diaryToggleTag(btn, tag) { const idx = diarySelTags.indexOf(tag); if (idx >= 0) { diarySelTags.splice(idx, 1); btn.classList.remove('on'); btn.style.background = 'white'; } else { diarySelTags.push(tag); btn.classList.add('on'); btn.style.background = '#FFE0A0'; } } function diaryInit() { const dateEl = document.getElementById('diary-date'); if (dateEl && !dateEl.value) dateEl.value = new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10); diaryCurrentMood = 'happy'; diaryPhoto = null; diarySelTags = []; // Reset tag chips document.querySelectorAll('#diary-tag-chips .sym-chip').forEach(c => { c.classList.remove('on'); c.style.background='white'; }); const prev = document.getElementById('diary-photo-preview'); if (prev) prev.style.display = 'none'; diaryUpdateMoodUI(); diaryRenderEntries(); diaryUpdateCountLabel(); } const DIARY_MOODS = { happy: {em:'😊', label:'開心', color:'#FFD460'}, excited: {em:'🤩', label:'超興奮', color:'#FF8B7B'}, sweet: {em:'🥰', label:'超可愛', color:'#FF8FAB'}, sleepy: {em:'😴', label:'睡很多', color:'#B5A8E3'}, curious: {em:'🧐', label:'好奇', color:'#90CBF9'}, naughty: {em:'😈', label:'調皮', color:'#C8A0F8'}, cry: {em:'😭', label:'哭鬧', color:'#A0C8F8'}, sick: {em:'🤒', label:'生病了', color:'#F0C8A0'}, brave: {em:'💪', label:'超勇敢', color:'#A8D8A0'}, milestone:{em:'🌟', label:'里程碑', color:'#FFE080'}, }; function diaryMood(mood, el) { diaryCurrentMood = mood; diaryUpdateMoodUI(); } function diaryUpdateMoodUI() { Object.keys(DIARY_MOODS).forEach(m => { const btn = document.getElementById('dm-'+m); if (!btn) return; const isSelected = m === diaryCurrentMood; btn.style.background = isSelected ? (DIARY_MOODS[m].color||'#FFD460') : 'white'; btn.style.borderColor = isSelected ? (DIARY_MOODS[m].color||'#FFD460') : '#FFD0A0'; btn.style.transform = isSelected ? 'scale(1.18)' : 'scale(1)'; btn.style.boxShadow = isSelected ? '0 3px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.12)' : 'none'; }); } function diaryAddPhoto(input) { const file = input.files[0]; if (!file) return; const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = e => { diaryPhoto = e.target.result; const img = document.getElementById('diary-photo-img'); const prev = document.getElementById('diary-photo-preview'); if (img) img.src = diaryPhoto; if (prev) prev.style.display = ''; }; reader.readAsDataURL(file); } function diaryRemovePhoto() { diaryPhoto = null; const prev = document.getElementById('diary-photo-preview'); if (prev) prev.style.display = 'none'; } function diarySave() { const dateEl = document.getElementById('diary-date'); const contentEl = document.getElementById('diary-content'); if (!dateEl?.value) { sShowToast('請選擇日期！'); return; } if (!contentEl?.value.trim()){ sShowToast('請寫下日記內容！'); return; } const entry = { id: Date.now(), date: dateEl.value, mood: diaryCurrentMood, tags: [...diarySelTags], content: contentEl.value.trim(), photo: diaryPhoto || null }; diaryEntries.unshift(entry); contentEl.value = ''; diaryPhoto = null; diarySelTags = []; document.getElementById('diary-photo-preview').style.display = 'none'; document.querySelectorAll('#diary-tag-chips .sym-chip').forEach(c => { c.classList.remove('on'); c.style.background='white'; }); diaryCurrentMood = 'happy'; diaryUpdateMoodUI(); diaryRenderEntries(); diaryUpdateCountLabel(); dbAutosave(); sShowToast('📔 日記儲存！'); showVoice('📔 成長故事記錄好了！' + (babyData.name||'寶寶') + ' 會一直記得這一天 🌟'); } function diaryUpdateCountLabel() { const el = document.getElementById('diary-count-label'); if (el) el.textContent = diaryEntries.length + ' 則回憶'; const summaryEl = document.getElementById('diary-mood-summary');
