if (!summaryEl) return; const moodCounts = {}; diaryEntries.forEach(e => { moodCounts[e.mood] = (moodCounts[e.mood]||0)+1; }); summaryEl.innerHTML = Object.entries(moodCounts).map(([m,n]) => { const md = DIARY_MOODS[m] || {em: m, color:'#FFD460'}; return `${md.em} ×${n}`; }).join(''); } function diaryRenderEntries() { const el = document.getElementById('diary-entries-list'); if (!el) return; if (!diaryEntries.length) { el.innerHTML = `
📔
還沒有日記
記錄第一篇成長故事吧！
`; return; } el.innerHTML = diaryEntries.map(e => { const md = (typeof DIARY_MOODS !== 'undefined' && DIARY_MOODS[e.mood]) || {em:'📔', label:'記錄', color:'#FFD460'}; const tagHtml = (e.tags||[]).map(t => `${t}` ).join(''); return `
${md.em}
${e.date}
${md.label}
${tagHtml ? `
${tagHtml}
` : ''} ${e.photo ? `` : ''}
${e.content}
`; }).join(''); } function diaryDelete(id) { customConfirm('刪除這篇日記？', () => { diaryEntries = diaryEntries.filter(e=>e.id!==id); diaryRenderEntries(); diaryUpdateCountLabel(); dbAutosave(); sShowToast('🗑️ 日記已刪除'); }, '📔'); } // ===== OUTDOOR CHECKLIST FUNCTIONS ===== // ── From reference file — detailed packing lists per trip type ── const PACK_LISTS = { park:{ label:'🌳 去公園', sections:[ {em:'🍼',name:'餵食',items:[ {id:'p_formula',name:'奶粉/母乳',note:'足夠的量 + 備用'}, {id:'p_bottle',name:'奶瓶/保溫瓶'}, {id:'p_bib',name:'圍兜',note:'多帶一條'}, {id:'p_snack',name:'副食品/點心',note:'月齡適合的'}, {id:'p_water',name:'寶寶喝水杯'}, {id:'p_spoon',name:'湯匙'}, ]}, {em:'🧷',name:'換尿布',items:[ {id:'p_diaper',name:'尿布',note:'比預計多帶2片'}, {id:'p_wipes',name:'濕紙巾'}, {id:'p_pad',name:'拋棄式尿布墊'}, {id:'p_bag',name:'垃圾袋',note:'裝髒尿布用'}, {id:'p_cream',name:'護臀膏'}, {id:'p_change',name:'備用衣物',note:'至少1套'}, ]}, {em:'☀️',name:'防曬防蚊',items:[ {id:'p_sunscreen',name:'嬰兒防曬乳',note:'6個月以上使用'}, {id:'p_hat',name:'遮陽帽'}, {id:'p_repellent',name:'嬰兒防蚊液',note:'天然成分'}, {id:'p_umbrella',name:'遮陽傘'}, ]}, {em:'🏥',name:'急救備用',items:[ {id:'p_med',name:'退燒藥',note:'醫師處方'}, {id:'p_bandaid',name:'OK繃'}, {id:'p_thermometer',name:'耳溫槍'}, ]}, {em:'🎒',name:'其他必備',items:[ {id:'p_stroller',name:'推車/揹巾'}, {id:'p_mat',name:'野餐墊'}, {id:'p_toy',name:'玩具/書',note:'轉移注意力用'}, {id:'p_phone',name:'行動電源'}, {id:'p_cash',name:'現金/信用卡'}, ]}, ] }, short:{ label:'🏙️ 短途出遊（市區／百貨／餐廳）', sections:[ {em:'🍼',name:'餵食',items:[ {id:'s_formula',name:'奶粉/母乳',note:'多帶1–2份'}, {id:'s_bottle',name:'奶瓶'}, {id:'s_bib',name:'圍兜 × 2'}, {id:'s_snack',name:'副食品/點心',note:'月齡適合的'}, {id:'s_water',name:'吸管水杯'}, {id:'s_spoon',name:'湯匙 + 叉子'}, {id:'s_lunchbox',name:'副食品便當盒',note:'保冷袋攜帶'}, ]}, {em:'🧷',name:'換尿布衣物',items:[ {id:'s_diaper',name:'尿布 × 4–6片'}, {id:'s_wipes',name:'濕紙巾'}, {id:'s_pad',name:'拋棄式尿布墊'}, {id:'s_bag',name:'垃圾袋'}, {id:'s_cream',name:'護臀膏'}, {id:'s_change',name:'備用衣物 × 2套'}, ]}, {em:'🛍️',name:'外出必備',items:[ {id:'s_bag',name:'媽媽包/後背包'}, {id:'s_stroller',name:'推車/揹巾'}, {id:'s_mat',name:'攜帶式摺疊墊'}, {id:'s_toy',name:'安撫玩具/咬咬巾'}, {id:'s_sunhat',name:'遮陽帽'}, {id:'s_phone',name:'行動電源'}, {id:'s_card',name:'信用卡/現金'}, ]}, {em:'🏥',name:'急救衛生',items:[ {id:'s_med',name:'退燒藥',note:'醫師處方'}, {id:'s_therm',name:'耳溫槍'}, {id:'s_sanitizer',name:'乾洗手'}, {id:'s_bandaid',name:'OK繃'}, ]}, {em:'🌟',name:'室內場所加強',items:[ {id:'s_blanket',name:'薄毯/包巾',note:'冷氣房保暖'}, {id:'s_socks',name:'備用襪子'}, {id:'s_book',name:'小繪本/靜態玩具'}, {id:'s_repellent',name:'防蚊液',note:'天然成分'}, ]}, ] }, domestic:{ label:'🏨 國內過夜', sections:[ {em:'🍼',name:'餵食',items:[ {id:'d_formula',name:'奶粉',note:'每日用量 × 天數 + 備用'}, {id:'d_bottles',name:'奶瓶（多支）'}, {id:'d_sterilizer',name:'消毒鍋/消毒袋'}, {id:'d_bib',name:'圍兜（多條）'}, {id:'d_food',name:'副食品/泥狀食物'}, {id:'d_spoon',name:'餵食湯匙'}, {id:'d_water',name:'寶寶飲水杯'}, ]}, {em:'😴',name:'睡眠',items:[ {id:'d_bed',name:'嬰兒床/床圍護墊'}, {id:'d_blanket',name:'寶寶熟悉的毯子'}, {id:'d_plush',name:'安撫玩具'}, {id:'d_noise',name:'白噪音機/App',note:'幫助入眠'}, {id:'d_sleep',name:'睡眠袋'}, ]}, {em:'🧷',name:'換尿布衣物',items:[ {id:'d_diaper',name:'尿布（足量）',note:'每日8–10片 × 天數'}, {id:'d_wipes',name:'濕紙巾（多包）'}, {id:'d_cream',name:'護臀膏'}, {id:'d_clothes',name:'衣物（天數 × 2套）'}, {id:'d_pyjamas',name:'睡衣'}, {id:'d_laundry',name:'洗衣袋/洗衣液'}, ]}, {em:'🏥',name:'醫藥急救',items:[ {id:'d_med',name:'退燒藥/止痛藥',note:'醫師處方'}, {id:'d_therm',name:'耳溫槍'}, {id:'d_bandaid',name:'急救包'}, {id:'d_hcard',name:'健保卡'}, ]}, {em:'🛁',name:'洗澡用品',items:[ {id:'d_shampoo',name:'寶寶洗髮/沐浴乳'}, {id:'d_tub',name:'摺疊浴盆',note:'如飯店浴缸不安全'}, {id:'d_towel',name:'浴巾（寶寶專用）'}, ]}, {em:'🎒',name:'其他',items:[ {id:'d_stroller',name:'推車/揹巾'}, {id:'d_toy',name:'玩具/繪本'}, {id:'d_phone',name:'行動電源'}, {id:'d_camera',name:'相機/備用記憶卡'}, ]}, ] }, flight:{ label:'✈️ 出國搭機', sections:[ {em:'📄',name:'重要證件',items:[ {id:'f_passport',name:'寶寶護照',note:'出發前確認效期'}, {id:'f_visa',name:'簽證（如需要）'}, {id:'f_ticket',name:'機票（列印/電子票）'}, {id:'f_insurance',name:'旅遊平安保險'}, {id:'f_hcard',name:'健保卡/接種記錄'}, ]}, {em:'🍼',name:'機上餵食',items:[ {id:'f_formula',name:'奶粉（隨身足量）',note:'液態奶粉通關更方便'}, {id:'f_water',name:'登機後買水/溫水申請'}, {id:'f_snack',name:'零食點心（多種）'}, {id:'f_bib',name:'圍兜（多條）'}, {id:'f_spoon',name:'湯匙組'}, ]}, {em:'😴',name:'機上睡眠',items:[ {id:'f_blanket',name:'攜帶式薄毯'}, {id:'f_plush',name:'安撫玩具/安撫巾'}, {id:'f_bassinet',name:'預訂嬰兒搖籃座位',note:'提前聯繫航空公司'}, {id:'f_earmuff',name:'嬰兒耳機/耳罩'}, ]}, {em:'🧷',name:'換尿布',items:[ {id:'f_diaper',name:'尿布（機上 + 備用）',note:'每小時1片 + 備用'}, {id:'f_wipes',name:'濕紙巾（夾鏈袋分裝）'}, {id:'f_pad',name:'尿布墊'}, {id:'f_bag',name:'加厚垃圾袋（有味道）'}, {id:'f_clothes',name:'備用衣物 × 3套',note:'嘔吐/漏尿準備'}, ]}, {em:'🎮',name:'機上娛樂',items:[ {id:'f_toy',name:'新玩具（保持新鮮感）'}, {id:'f_book',name:'硬頁書/貼紙書'}, {id:'f_tablet',name:'平板+兒歌/影片（下載離線）'}, {id:'f_earphone',name:'兒童耳機'}, {id:'f_snack2',name:'零食禮包（安撫用）'}, ]}, {em:'🏥',name:'醫療急救',items:[ {id:'f_med',name:'退燒藥'}, {id:'f_therm',name:'耳溫槍'}, {id:'f_saline',name:'生理食鹽水鼻噴霧',note:'機艙乾燥用'}, {id:'f_bandaid',name:'急救包'}, ]}, ] } }; let packCurrentType = 'park'; let packChecked = {}; // {itemId: true} let packCustomItems = []; // [{id, cat, name, note}] let packFavorites = []; // up to 10 favorites [{id, name, type, checked:{...}, custom:[...]}] const DEFAULT_CHECKLIST = []; // legacy compat function outChecklistInit() { // In new design, the outdoor page uses pack lists packRender(); } function packSetType(type) { packCurrentType = type; packChecked = {}; // Reset checks when switching type document.querySelectorAll('.pack-type-btn').forEach(b => { b.classList.toggle('on', b.dataset.pt === type); }); packRender(); } function packRender() { const el = document.getElementById('checklist-items-container'); if (!el) return; const list = PACK_LISTS[packCurrentType]; const custom = packCustomItems.filter(i => i.tripType === packCurrentType || !i.tripType); const allItems = [...list.sections.flatMap(s=>s.items), ...custom]; const total = allItems.length; const done = allItems.filter(i => packChecked[i.id]).length; const progBar = document.getElementById('chk-prog-bar'); const progLabel = document.getElementById('chk-prog-label'); if (progBar) progBar.style.width = total ? Math.round(done/total*100)+'%':'0%'; if (progLabel) progLabel.textContent = done + ' / ' + total; let html = ''; list.sections.forEach(sec => { html += `
${sec.em} ${sec.name}
`; sec.items.forEach(item => { const checked = packChecked[item.id]; html += `
${checked?'✓':''}
${item.name}
${item.note?`
${item.note}
`:''}
`; }); html += `
`; }); // Custom items if (custom.length) { html += `
⭐ 自訂項目
`; custom.forEach(item => { const checked = packChecked[item.id]; html += `
${checked?'✓':''}
${item.name}
`; }); html += `
`; } el.innerHTML = html; packRenderFavorites(); } function packToggle(id) { packChecked[id] = !packChecked[id]; packRender(); dbAutosave(); } function packReset() { customConfirm('重置所有勾選？', () => { packChecked = {}; packRender(); dbAutosave(); sShowToast('🔄 已重置清單'); }, '🎒'); } function packCheckAll() { const list = PACK_LISTS[packCurrentType]; list.sections.forEach(s => s.items.forEach(i => { packChecked[i.id] = true; })); packCustomItems.filter(i=>!i.tripType||i.tripType===packCurrentType) .forEach(i => { packChecked[i.id] = true; }); packRender(); dbAutosave(); } function packAddCustom() { // Use chk-add-overlay modal (reuse existing) const existing = document.getElementById('chk-add-overlay'); if (existing) existing.remove(); const overlay = document.createElement('div'); overlay.id = 'chk-add-overlay'; overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.45);z-index:700;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center;'; overlay.innerHTML = `
➕ 新增出門清單項目
`; document.body.appendChild(overlay); overlay.addEventListener('click', e => { if(e.target===overlay) overlay.remove(); }); setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('chk-add-name')?.focus(), 100); } function packConfirmAdd() { const name = document.getElementById('chk-add-name')?.value.trim(); const note = document.getElementById('chk-add-note')?.value.trim() || ''; document.getElementById('chk-add-overlay')?.remove(); if (!name) { sShowToast('請輸入項目名稱！'); return; } const id = 'custom_'+Date.now(); packCustomItems.push({id, name, note, tripType: packCurrentType}); packRender(); dbAutosave(); sShowToast('✅ 已新增：' + name); } function packDeleteCustom(id) { packCustomItems = packCustomItems.filter(i=>i.id!==id); delete packChecked[id]; packRender(); dbAutosave(); } // ── Pack Favorites (最多10個) ───────────────────────── function packSaveFavorite() { if (packFavorites.length >= 10) { sShowToast('最多儲存10個最愛行程！'); return; } const tripLabel = {park:'🌳 去公園', domestic:'🏨 國內過夜', flight:'✈️ 出國搭機'}[packCurrentType]; const overlay = document.createElement('div'); overlay.id = 'fav-name-overlay'; overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.45);z-index:700;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center;'; overlay.innerHTML = `
⭐ 儲存最愛行程
行程類型：${tripLabel}
`; document.body.appendChild(overlay); overlay.addEventListener('click', e => { if(e.target===overlay) overlay.remove(); }); setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('fav-name-inp')?.focus(), 100); } function packConfirmFav() { const name = document.getElementById('fav-name-inp')?.value.trim(); document.getElementById('fav-name-overlay')?.remove(); if (!name) { sShowToast('請輸入行程名稱！'); return; } if (packFavorites.length >= 10) { sShowToast('最多儲存10個最愛行程！'); return; } packFavorites.push({ id: 'fav_'+Date.now(), name, type: packCurrentType, checked: {...packChecked}, custom: [...packCustomItems] }); packRenderFavorites(); dbAutosave(); sShowToast('⭐ 最愛行程「'+name+'」已儲存！'); } function packLoadFav(id) { const fav = packFavorites.find(f=>f.id===id); if (!fav) return; packCurrentType = fav.type; packChecked = {...fav.checked}; document.querySelectorAll('.pack-type-btn').forEach(b => { b.classList.toggle('on', b.dataset.pt === fav.type); }); packRender(); sShowToast('📂 載入最愛：'+fav.name); } function packDeleteFav(id) { packFavorites = packFavorites.filter(f=>f.id!==id); packRenderFavorites(); dbAutosave(); sShowToast('已刪除最愛'); } function packRenderFavorites() { const el = document.getElementById('pack-favorites-list'); if (!el) return; if (!packFavorites.length) { el.innerHTML = '
還沒有最愛行程，勾選完清單後點「儲存最愛」！
'; return; } const typeEmoji = {park:'🌳', domestic:'🏨', flight:'✈️'}; el.innerHTML = packFavorites.slice(0,10).map(f => `
${typeEmoji[f.type]||'📋'}
${f.name}
`).join(''); } function checklistRender() { const el = document.getElementById('checklist-items-container'); if (!el) return; const total = outChecklistItems.length; const done = outChecklistItems.filter(i=>outChecklistChecked[i.id]).length; const progBar = document.getElementById('chk-prog-bar'); const progLabel = document.getElementById('chk-prog-label'); if (progBar) progBar.style.width = total ? Math.round(done/total*100)+'%' : '0%'; if (progLabel) progLabel.textContent = done + ' / ' + total; const cats = {}; outChecklistItems.forEach(i => { if(!cats[i.cat]) cats[i.cat]=[]; cats[i.cat].push(i); }); el.innerHTML = Object.entries(cats).map(([cat, items]) => `
📦 ${cat}
${items.map(item => { const checked = outChecklistChecked[item.id]; return `
${checked?'✓':''}
${item.em}
${item.name}
${item.tip ? `
${item.tip}
` : ''}
`; }).join('')}
`).join(''); } function checklistToggle(id) { outChecklistChecked[id] = !outChecklistChecked[id]; checklistRender(); dbAutosave(); } function checklistDelete(id) { outChecklistItems = outChecklistItems.filter(i=>i.id!==id); delete outChecklistChecked[id]; checklistRender(); dbAutosave(); } function checklistReset() { Object.keys(outChecklistChecked).forEach(k => outChecklistChecked[k]=false); checklistRender(); dbAutosave(); sShowToast('✅ 清單已重置'); } function openChecklistAddModal() { // Use custom inline modal instead of prompt() (blocked on iOS) const existing = document.getElementById('chk-add-overlay'); if (existing) existing.remove(); const overlay = document.createElement('div'); overlay.id = 'chk-add-overlay'; overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.45);z-index:700;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center;'; overlay.innerHTML = `
➕ 新增出門清單項目
📦 項目名稱
🏷️ 分類
`; document.body.appendChild(overlay); overlay.addEventListener('click', e => { if(e.target===overlay) overlay.remove(); }); setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('chk-add-name')?.focus(), 100); } function chkAddConfirm() { const name = document.getElementById('chk-add-name')?.value.trim(); const cat = document.getElementById('chk-add-cat')?.value || '其他'; document.getElementById('chk-add-overlay')?.remove(); if (!name) { sShowToast('請輸入項目名稱！'); return; } outChecklistItems.push({id:'chk_c_'+Date.now(), cat, em:'📦', name, tip:''}); checklistRender(); dbAutosave(); sShowToast('✅ 已新增：' + name); } // ===== FAMILY 7-DAY STATS FUNCTIONS ===== function fam7RenderStats() { const el = document.getElementById('fam7-member-chart'); if (!el) return; // Count all logs from last 7 days const now = Date.now(); const day7 = 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000; const allLogs = [ ...(milkLogs||[]).map(l=>({ts:l.ts||l.time||0, type:'餵奶'})), ...(diaperLogs||[]).map(l=>({ts:l.ts||0, type:'換尿布'})), ...(slLogs||[]).map(l=>({ts:l.start||0, type:'睡眠'})), ...(careLogs||[]).map(l=>({ts:l.ts||0, type:'護理'})), ].filter(l => (now - new Date(l.ts).getTime()) < day7); // Per-member stats (use famSelf + famMembers) const allMembers = [ {name: famSelf.name||'主要照護者', avatar: famSelf.avatar||'👩', count: Math.floor(allLogs.length * 0.6)}, ...famMembers.map((m,i) => ({name:m.name, avatar:m.avatar||'👤', count: Math.floor(allLogs.length * (0.4/(famMembers.length||1)))})) ]; const maxCount = Math.max(...allMembers.map(m=>m.count), 1); el.innerHTML = allMembers.map(m => `
${m.avatar}
${m.name}
${m.count}
`).join(''); // Category breakdown const catEl = document.getElementById('fam7-cat-breakdown'); if (catEl) { const cats = {}; allLogs.forEach(l => { cats[l.type] = (cats[l.type]||0)+1; }); catEl.innerHTML = Object.entries(cats).map(([cat,n]) => `
${cat}
${n}
`).join('') || '
近7天無紀錄
'; } // Daily trend const barsEl = document.getElementById('fam7-daily-bars'); const labelsEl = document.getElementById('fam7-daily-labels'); if (barsEl && labelsEl) { const days = []; for (let d=6;d>=0;d--) { const dt = new Date(now - d*24*60*60*1000); const dateStr = dt.toISOString().slice(0,10); const count = allLogs.filter(l => new Date(l.ts).toISOString().slice(0,10)===dateStr).length; days.push({dateStr, count, label: (dt.getMonth()+1)+'/'+(dt.getDate())}); } const maxDay = Math.max(...days.map(d=>d.count),1); barsEl.innerHTML = days.map(d => `
${d.count||''}
`).join(''); labelsEl.innerHTML = days.map(d => `
${d.label}
`).join(''); } } // ===== FAMILY MESSAGE BOARD FUNCTIONS ===== // ── Board state ─────────────────────────────────────── let boardSelMsgType = 'general'; let boardSelTags = []; let boardPinState = false; let boardComposePhoto = null; let boardFilterTypeCur = 'all'; const BOARD_TYPE_LABELS = {general:'💬 一般',reminder:'🔔 提醒',urgent:'🚨 緊急',good:'🎉 好消息',question:'❓ 問題',milestone:'🌟 里程碑'}; const BOARD_TYPE_COLORS = {general:'#FFA040',reminder:'#6A40A0',urgent:'#C03030',good:'#2A7A30',question:'#1A40A0',milestone:'#A08000'}; const BOARD_TYPE_BG = {general:'#FFF8F0',reminder:'#F5F0FF',urgent:'#FFF0F0',good:'#EDFAF3',question:'#EEF4FF',milestone:'#FFFBEE'}; const BOARD_TEMPLATES = { '喝奶紀錄':`寶寶 ${new Date().getHours()}:${String(new Date().getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0')} 喝了 __cc，狀況良好！`, '換尿布':`已幫寶寶換尿布，便便狀況：___`, '入睡通知':`寶寶 ${new Date().getHours()}:${String(new Date().getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0')} 入睡了，請保持安靜～`, '體溫通知':`寶寶體溫：___°C，請留意！`, '提醒事項':`提醒：___`, '里程碑':`🌟 里程碑！寶寶今天第一次___！`, }; function boardOpenNew() { boardSelMsgType='general'; boardSelTags=[]; boardPinState=false; boardComposePhoto=null; const inp=document.getElementById('board-msg-inp'); if(inp) inp.value=''; const prev=document.getElementById('board-photo-preview'); if(prev) prev.style.display='none'; document.querySelectorAll('.btype-btn').forEach(b=>{b.style.background='white';b.classList.remove('on');}); const first=document.querySelector('.btype-btn'); if(first){first.style.background='#FFA040';first.style.color='white';first.classList.add('on');} document.querySelectorAll('#board-tag-chips .sym-chip').forEach(c=>{c.classList.remove('on');c.style.background='white';}); boardUpdatePinUI(); // Poster chips const allNames=[famSelf.name||'主要照護者',...famMembers.map(m=>m.name)].filter(Boolean); if(!boardPosterName&&allNames.length) boardPosterName=allNames[0]; const chipEl=document.getElementById('board-poster-chips'); if(chipEl) chipEl.innerHTML=allNames.map(n=>`
${n.slice(0,1)}
`).join(''); const m=document.getElementById('board-compose-modal');const b=document.getElementById('board-compose-box'); if(m){m.style.opacity='1';m.style.pointerEvents='auto';} if(b) b.style.transform='translateY(0)'; } function boardComposeClose(e){ if(!e||e===true||e.target===document.getElementById('board-compose-modal')){ const m=document.getElementById('board-compose-modal');const b=document.getElementById('board-compose-box'); if(m){m.style.opacity='0';m.style.pointerEvents='none';} if(b) b.style.transform='translateY(100%)'; } } function boardSelType(type,btn){ boardSelMsgType=type; document.querySelectorAll('.btype-btn').forEach(b=>{b.style.background='white';b.style.color='';b.classList.remove('on');}); if(btn){btn.style.background=BOARD_TYPE_COLORS[type]||'#FFA040';btn.style.color='white';btn.classList.add('on');} } function boardToggleTag(btn,tag){ const idx=boardSelTags.indexOf(tag); if(idx>=0){boardSelTags.splice(idx,1);btn.classList.remove('on');btn.style.background='white';} else{boardSelTags.push(tag);btn.classList.add('on');btn.style.background='#FFE0B0';} } function boardTemplate(name){const inp=document.getElementById('board-msg-inp');if(inp)inp.value=BOARD_TEMPLATES[name]||name;} function boardTogglePin(){boardPinState=!boardPinState;boardUpdatePinUI();} function boardUpdatePinUI(){ const t=document.getElementById('board-pin-toggle');const k=document.getElementById('board-pin-knob'); if(t)t.style.background=boardPinState?'#FFA040':'#E0D0C0'; if(k)k.style.left=boardPinState?'21px':'3px'; } function boardPhotoSelect(input){ const file=input.files[0];if(!file)return; const reader=new FileReader(); reader.onload=e=>{ boardComposePhoto=e.target.result; const img=document.getElementById('board-photo-img');const prev=document.getElementById('board-photo-preview'); if(img)img.src=boardComposePhoto;if(prev)prev.style.display=''; }; reader.readAsDataURL(file); } function boardPhotoRemove(){boardComposePhoto=null;const prev=document.getElementById('board-photo-preview');if(prev)prev.style.display='none';} function boardSetPoster(name){ boardPosterName=name; const allNames=[famSelf.name||'主要照護者',...famMembers.map(m=>m.name)].filter(Boolean); const chipEl=document.getElementById('board-poster-chips'); if(chipEl)chipEl.innerHTML=allNames.map(n=>`
${n.slice(0,1)}
`).join(''); } function boardAddEmoji(em){const inp=document.getElementById('board-msg-inp');if(inp){inp.value+=em;inp.focus();}} function boardFilterType(type,btn){ boardFilterTypeCur=type; document.querySelectorAll('#board-type-filter button').forEach(b=>{b.style.background='white';b.style.borderColor='#E0D0F0';}); if(btn){btn.style.background='#FFA040';btn.style.color='white';btn.style.borderColor='#FFA040';} boardRender(); } function boardPostMsg(){ const inp=document.getElementById('board-msg-inp'); if(!inp||!inp.value.trim()){sShowToast('請先寫下留言內容！');return;} const msg={id:Date.now(),ts:Date.now(),poster:boardPosterName||'家人',msg:inp.value.trim(), type:boardSelMsgType,tags:[...boardSelTags],pinned:boardPinState,photo:boardComposePhoto||null}; if(boardPinState){boardMessages=boardMessages.filter(m=>!m.pinned);boardMessages.unshift(msg);} else boardMessages.unshift(msg); boardComposeClose(true);boardRender();dbAutosave();sShowToast('💬 留言發送成功！'); } function boardDelete(id){ customConfirm('刪除這則留言？',()=>{boardMessages=boardMessages.filter(m=>m.id!==id);boardRender();dbAutosave();sShowToast('🗑️ 留言已刪除');},'💬'); } function boardRender(){ const el=document.getElementById('board-msgs-list');if(!el)return; let msgs=boardFilterTypeCur==='all'?boardMessages:boardMessages.filter(m=>m.type===boardFilterTypeCur); const sorted=[...msgs.filter(m=>m.pinned),...msgs.filter(m=>!m.pinned)]; if(!sorted.length){ el.innerHTML=`
💬
還沒有留言
點擊「新增留言」分享今天的育兒故事！
`; return; } el.innerHTML=sorted.map(m=>{ const d=new Date(m.ts); const timeStr=d.toLocaleDateString('zh-TW',{month:'2-digit',day:'2-digit'})+' '+d.toLocaleTimeString('zh-TW',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'}); const typeLabel=BOARD_TYPE_LABELS[m.type]||'💬 一般'; const typeBg=BOARD_TYPE_BG[m.type]||'#FFF8F0'; const typeColor=BOARD_TYPE_COLORS[m.type]||'#FFA040'; const tagHtml=(m.tags||[]).map(t=>`${t}`).join(''); return `
${m.pinned?'
📌 置頂
':''}
${(m.poster||'家')[0]}
${m.poster||'家人'}
${timeStr}
${typeLabel}
${m.photo?``:''}
${m.msg}
${tagHtml?`
${tagHtml}
`:''}
`; }).join(''); } function expClearAll() { customConfirm('確定清除所有資料？此動作無法復原！', () => { try { localStorage.removeItem('baby_diary_v2'); } catch(e) {} sShowToast('✅ 資料已清除，頁面將重新載入'); setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 1200); }, '🗑️'); } // ===== PARENTING KNOWLEDGE FUNCTIONS ===== const KNOW_DATA = { newborn: [ {title:'黃疸怎麼辦？', em:'🌡️', content:'新生兒黃疸（生理性）通常在出生後2–3天出現，7–10天消退。母乳寶寶可能持續較久。每天曬太陽10–15分鐘（避免直射眼睛）有助改善。若黃疸出現過早（24小時內）、持續超過2週，或寶寶反應差，請就醫。'}, {title:'臍帶護理', em:'🩹', content:'保持乾燥是最重要原則！以酒精棉籤清潔根部一圈，讓尿布折下來避免摩擦。臍帶通常1–3週自然脫落。若出現紅腫、化膿或異味，請就醫。'}, {title:'新生兒睡姿', em:'😴', content:'美國兒科學會（AAP）建議：嬰兒應以仰睡為主，直到1歲。不可與大人同床（共床），應使用嬰兒專用床墊，不放枕頭、玩具或厚被。趴睡只在白天、有大人看顧時練習抬頭。'}, {title:'脹氣腸絞痛怎麼辦？', em:'😭', content:'嬰兒脹氣常見原因：餵奶後未排氣、吞入空氣。每次餵奶後拍嗝5–10分鐘，可試飛機抱（趴在前臂），輕柔按摩肚子（順時針），溫水泡澡也有幫助。腸絞痛（每天哭3小時以上）通常在3–4個月後自然改善。'}, ], sleep: [ {title:'哄睡祕訣', em:'🌙', content:'建立固定的「睡前儀式」（洗澡→按摩→抱→放床），讓寶寶學會預期睡眠。甜蜜點（清醒窗結束前15–20分鐘）開始哄睡效果最好。白噪音模仿子宮環境，有助安撫入睡。'}, {title:'各月齡睡眠需求', em:'📊', content:'0–3個月：每日睡16–18小時，分多次。4–6個月：每日14–16小時，開始有規律。7–12個月：每日12–14小時，白天2次小睡。1–3歲：11–12小時夜眠＋1次午睡。'}, {title:'睡眠倒退期', em:'📉', content:'常見於4個月、8–9個月、18個月等。原因是大腦發育、長牙或環境變化。維持作息一致、增加安慰，通常2–6週可恢復。避免引入新的哄睡習慣（如整夜抱著）。'}, ], food: [ {title:'副食品開始時機', em:'🥕', content:'建議6個月大開始（最早4–5個月），需同時滿足：能支撐頭部穩定坐著、對食物有興趣、消失頂舌反射。先從單一食材泥狀開始，每次只引入1種新食材，觀察3–5天。'}, {title:'過敏食材怎麼引入？', em:'⚠️', content:'花生、蛋、牛奶、小麥、大豆、魚蝦、堅果等是常見過敏原。研究顯示4–6個月早期引入反而可降低過敏風險！應在白天引入，方便觀察反應（皮疹、嘔吐、腹瀉等）。若有過敏家族史，先諮詢醫師。'}, {title:'BLW vs 傳統副食品', em:'🍽️', content:'BLW（嬰兒主導式離乳）：6個月起直接給手指食物，寶寶自己抓著吃，訓練自主進食和精細動作，但家長需確保食物安全性（軟度、大小、窒息風險）。傳統泥狀：較易控制進食量，適合早期引入。可混合使用！'}, ], dev: [ {title:'大動作里程碑', em:'🏃', content:'2個月：俯臥抬頭。4個月：翻身。6個月：坐穩。9個月：爬行。12個月：扶站、可能走幾步。15個月：獨立行走。18個月：跑步。每個寶寶發展速度不同，有±2個月的正常範圍。'}, {title:'語言發展里程碑', em:'💬', content:'2個月：咿咿呀呀。6個月：發出多樣音節。9個月：模仿音調。12個月：說1–2個有意義的詞（媽媽、爸爸）。18個月：說10–20個詞。2歲：說2–3個詞的句子。若6個月還沒牙牙學語，建議評估。'}, {title:'手部精細動作', em:'✋', content:'3個月：張開手掌。4–5個月：用手握物。6個月：雙手傳物。7–8個月：拇食指捏取。9–10個月：用食指指物。12個月：放手投物。訓練方式：提供各種不同質地的玩具。'}, ], health: [ {title:'發燒怎麼辦？', em:'🌡️', content:'正常體溫：36.5–37.4°C（肛溫）。發燒定義：≥38°C。<3個月寶寶發燒→立即就醫。退燒藥：乙醯胺酚（2個月以上）、布洛芬（6個月以上），依體重計算劑量。補充水分最重要。38.5°C以上可給退燒藥，但若寶寶狀態好也可觀察。'}, {title:'何時該去急診？', em:'🚨', content:'立即就醫：<3個月發燒≥38°C、高燒≥40°C、抽搐、呼吸急促/困難、意識改變、唇色發紫、嚴重嘔吐脫水、皮膚出現紫斑。高燒持續>3天也應就診，即使精神好。'}, ], safety: [ {title:'防跌落安全', em:'🛡️', content:'寶寶會翻身後（約4個月），任何時候都不可獨自放在換尿布台或沙發上。床上加床欄，地板鋪防撞墊，樓梯上下端裝安全閘門。家具邊角貼防撞角。'}, {title:'窒息預防', em:'😮', content:'小物品（硬幣、電池、彈珠）放在寶寶拿不到的地方。食物切成1cm以下小塊，葡萄、熱狗、葡萄乾、硬果凍切碎。不給<1歲寶寶蜂蜜（肉毒桿菌風險）。玩具確認無小零件。'}, {title:'居家安全清單', em:'🏠', content:'插座蓋上安全蓋、熱水壺/熱飲遠離桌邊、洗碗精等清潔劑鎖好、寵物食物/碗移除、窗戶裝防墜鎖（尤其高樓）、馬桶蓋關好（防溺水）。'}, ] }; let knowCurrentCat = 'newborn'; function knowCat(cat, el) { knowCurrentCat = cat; document.querySelectorAll('.know-cat-btn').forEach(b => { b.style.background = 'white'; b.style.color = '#1A6A30'; b.style.borderColor = '#B0D8C0'; }); if (el) { el.style.background = '#2E9C58'; el.style.color = 'white'; el.style.borderColor = '#2E9C58'; } knowRender(cat); } function knowRender(cat) { const el = document.getElementById('know-cards-list'); if (!el) return; const items = KNOW_DATA[cat] || []; el.innerHTML = items.map(item => `
${item.em}
${item.title}
${item.content}
`).join(''); } // ===== VOICE ASSISTANT ===== let voiceOpen = false; const voiceResponses = [ '嗨！我是花花～有什麼需要幫忙嗎？你可以說「記錄喝奶」、「查看今天的紀錄」或是問我育兒問題喔！🌸', '今天寶寶總共喝了 750cc，達到建議量的 80%，下次餵奶可在下午3點前再補一次～', '根據寶寶體重 6.2kg，今日建議奶量是 620-930cc，目前已記錄 750cc，非常棒！🌟', '副食品小提醒：每次只引入1種新食材，觀察3-5天確認無過敏再嘗試下一種喔！🥕', '媽咪辛苦了！今天已餵了5次奶，你是最棒的媽咪！記得也要補充水分喔 💧' ]; let rIdx = 0; let _voiceHideTimer = null; let _voiceRecog = null; function toggleVoice() { const bubble = document.getElementById('voice-bubble'); const btn = document.getElementById('voice-btn'); if (!bubble || !btn) return; // If already open, close if (voiceOpen) { bubble.classList.remove('show'); btn.classList.remove('listening'); btn.textContent = '🌸'; clearTimeout(_voiceHideTimer); if (_voiceRecog) { try { _voiceRecog.stop(); } catch(e){} _voiceRecog = null; } voiceOpen = false; return; } voiceOpen = true; btn.textContent = '🎙️'; btn.classList.add('listening'); // Try Web Speech API first const SR = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition; if (SR) { const recog = new SR(); _voiceRecog = recog; recog.lang = 'zh-TW'; recog.interimResults = false; recog.maxAlternatives = 1; document.getElementById('voice-text').textContent = '🎙️ 請說話…（例如：記錄喝奶、開始睡覺）'; bubble.classList.add('show'); recog.onresult = e => { const said = e.results[0][0].transcript; handleVoiceCommand(said); }; recog.onerror = () => { showVoice('語音辨識失敗，請重試或直接點選功能 🌸'); btn.classList.remove('listening'); btn.textContent = '🌸'; voiceOpen = false; _voiceRecog = null; }; recog.onend = () => { btn.classList.remove('listening'); btn.textContent = '🌸'; _voiceRecog = null; clearTimeout(_voiceHideTimer); _voiceHideTimer = setTimeout(() => { bubble.classList.remove('show'); voiceOpen = false; }, 5000); }; recog.start(); } else { // Fallback: show text suggestions const msg = voiceResponses[rIdx % voiceResponses.length]; rIdx++; document.getElementById('voice-text').textContent = msg; bubble.classList.add('show'); setTimeout(() => { btn.classList.remove('listening'); btn.textContent = '🌸'; }, 600); clearTimeout(_voiceHideTimer); _voiceHideTimer = setTimeout(() => { bubble.classList.remove('show'); voiceOpen = false; }, 6000); } } function handleVoiceCommand(text) { const t = text.toLowerCase().replace(/\s/g,''); if (t.includes('喝奶')||t.includes('餵奶')||t.includes('瓶餵')) { showVoice(`好的！帶你去記錄喝奶 🍼`); goPage('page-milk'); return; } if (t.includes('睡覺')||t.includes('睡眠')||t.includes('開始睡')) { showVoice(`好的！幫你開始睡眠計時 🌙`); goPage('page-sleep'); return; } if (t.includes('換尿布')||t.includes('便便')||t.includes('尿布')) { showVoice(`好的！帶你去記錄換尿布 💩`); goPage('page-diaper'); return; } if (t.includes('副食品')||t.includes('吃飯')) { showVoice(`帶你去副食品記錄！`); goPage('page-solids'); return; } if (t.includes('成長')||t.includes('身高')||t.includes('體重')) { showVoice(`帶你去成長曲線！`); goPage('page-growth'); return; } if (t.includes('備份')||t.includes('匯出')) { showVoice(`好的！幫你匯出備份 💾`); setTimeout(dbExport,500); return; } // Fallback showVoice(`我聽到了「${text}」，目前支援：喝奶、睡覺、換尿布、副食品、成長、備份 🌸`); } function showVoice(text) { if (!text) return; const bubble = document.getElementById('voice-bubble'); const vtEl = document.getElementById('voice-text'); if (!bubble || !vtEl) return; vtEl.textContent = text; bubble.classList.add('show'); voiceOpen = true; clearTimeout(_voiceHideTimer); _voiceHideTimer = setTimeout(() => { bubble.classList.remove('show'); voiceOpen = false; }, 5000); } // ─── Draggable voice button ─────────────────────────────── (function() { var dragging=false, startX, startY, startBtnL, startBtnT; function getBtn(){ return document.getElementById('voice-btn'); } function getBub(){ return document.getElementById('voice-bubble'); } function onStart(e) { var t = e.touches ? e.touches[0] : e; startX=t.clientX; startY=t.clientY; var r = getBtn().getBoundingClientRect(); startBtnL=r.left; startBtnT=r.top; dragging=false; document.addEventListener('mousemove',onMove,{passive:false}); document.addEventListener('mouseup',onEnd); document.addEventListener('touchmove',onMove,{passive:false}); document.addEventListener('touchend',onEnd); } function onMove(e) { var t = e.touches ? e.touches[0] : e; var dx=t.clientX-startX, dy=t.clientY-startY; if (!dragging && Math.abs(dx)+Math.abs(dy)<8) return; dragging=true; e.preventDefault(); var btn=getBtn(), bub=getBub(); var W=window.innerWidth, H=window.innerHeight; var bw=btn.offsetWidth||42, bh=btn.offsetHeight||42; var nl=Math.max(6,Math.min(W-bw-6,startBtnL+dx)); var nt=Math.max(6,Math.min(H-bh-80,startBtnT+dy)); btn.style.right='auto'; btn.style.bottom='auto'; btn.style.left=nl+'px'; btn.style.top=nt+'px'; var bw2=bub.offsetWidth||200; var bl=nl+bw+8; if(bl+bw2>W-8) bl=nl-bw2-8; bub.style.right='auto'; bub.style.bottom='auto'; bub.style.left=Math.max(6,bl)+'px'; bub.style.top=nt+'px'; } function onEnd() { document.removeEventListener('mousemove',onMove); document.removeEventListener('mouseup',onEnd); document.removeEventListener('touchmove',onMove); document.removeEventListener('touchend',onEnd); if (!dragging) return; var btn=getBtn(), W=window.innerWidth; var r=btn.getBoundingClientRect(); var snapRight = r.left+r.width/2 > W/2; btn.style.left = snapRight ? 'auto' : r.left+'px'; btn.style.right = snapRight ? (W-r.right)+'px' : 'auto'; } window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){ var btn=getBtn(); if(!btn) return; btn.addEventListener('mousedown',onStart); btn.addEventListener('touchstart',onStart,{passive:true}); }); })(); // ===================================================== // ===================================================== // EXPORT / IMPORT — 一鍵備份與還原 // ===================================================== function dbExport() { try { const safe = v => (typeof v !== 'undefined') ? v : undefined; const data = { _version: 'baby_diary_v2', _exportedAt: new Date().toISOString(), _appName: '寶貝日記', babyData: safe(babyData), milkLogs: safe(milkLogs), sTrials: safe(sTrials), wgLogs: safe(wgLogs), suppLogs: safe(suppLogs), slLogs: safe(slLogs), diaperLogs: safe(diaperLogs), careLogs: safe(careLogs), illEpisodes: safe(illEpisodes), illFeverLogs: safe(illFeverLogs), illMeds: safe(illMeds), growthLogs: safe(growthLogs), vaxRecords: safe(vaxRecords), vaxSkipped: safe(vaxSkipped), allergyRecords: safe(allergyRecords), dentalRecords: safe(dentalRecords), vaxAppointments: safe(vaxAppointments), toothRecords: safe(toothRecords), badgeRecords: safe(badgeRecords), msRecords: safe(msRecords), msCustomItems: safe(msCustomItems), assHistory: safe(assHistory), outActivities: safe(outActivities), assResults: safe(assResults), szWardrobeItems: safe(szWardrobeItems), szMeasurements: safe(szMeasurements), szShoppingList: safe(szShoppingList), invItems: safe(invItems), bgtExpenses: safe(bgtExpenses), bgtMonthBudget: safe(bgtMonthBudget), bgtCatBudgets: safe(bgtCatBudgets), famMembers: safe(famMembers), famSelf: safe(famSelf), famInviteCode: safe(famInviteCode), nfySettings: safe(nfySettings), nfyHistory: safe(nfyHistory), fsMealLogs: safe(fsMealLogs), fsCurrentStage: safe(fsCurrentStage), glCustomItems: safe(glCustomItems), glGeneratedItems: safe(glGeneratedItems), diaryEntries: safe(diaryEntries), boardMessages: safe(boardMessages), outChecklistItems: safe(outChecklistItems), outChecklistChecked: safe(outChecklistChecked), packChecked: safe(packChecked), packCustomItems: safe(packCustomItems), packFavorites: safe(packFavorites), featureVisible: safe(featureVisible), recSavedLinks: safe(recSavedLinks), }; const json = JSON.stringify(data, null, 2); const blob = new Blob([json], { type: 'application/json' }); const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob); const d = new Date(); const pad = n => String(n).padStart(2, '0'); const fname = `寶貝日記備份_${d.getFullYear()}${pad(d.getMonth()+1)}${pad(d.getDate())}_${pad(d.getHours())}${pad(d.getMinutes())}.json`; const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = url; a.download = fname; document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); document.body.removeChild(a); setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 3000); expLastExport = new Date().toISOString(); dbAutosave(); dbUpdateExportLabel(); sShowToast('✅ 備份成功！檔案已儲存到手機'); if (navigator.vibrate) navigator.vibrate([50, 30, 50]); } catch(e) { sShowToast('⚠️ 匯出失敗：' + e.message); } } function dbImportTrigger() { document.getElementById('db-import-file').value = ''; document.getElementById('db-import-file').click(); } function dbImportFile(input) { const file = input.files[0]; if (!file) return; const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = function(e) { try { const d = JSON.parse(e.target.result); if (!d._version || !d.babyData) { sShowToast('⚠️ 檔案格式不對，請選擇寶貝日記的備份檔'); return; } const milkCount = (d.milkLogs || []).length; const sleepCount = (d.slLogs || []).length; const dpCount = (d.diaperLogs|| []).length; const grCount = (d.growthLogs|| []).length; const exportDate = d._exportedAt ? new Date(d._exportedAt).toLocaleString('zh-TW') : '未知'; const msg = `確定要還原這份備份嗎？\n\n📅 備份時間：${exportDate}\n🍼 喝奶：${milkCount} 筆\n😴 睡眠：${sleepCount} 筆\n💧 尿布：${dpCount} 筆\n📈 成長：${grCount} 筆\n\n⚠️ 這會覆蓋目前手機裡的所有資料！`; customConfirm(msg, () => { try { if (d.babyData && typeof d.babyData === 'object') Object.assign(babyData, d.babyData); if (babyData.bloodType === undefined) babyData.bloodType = ''; const restore = (key, tgt) => { if (d[key]) { if (typeof tgt === 'object' && !Array.isArray(tgt)) Object.assign(tgt, d[key]); } }; if (d.milkLogs) milkLogs = d.milkLogs; if (d.sTrials) sTrials = d.sTrials; if (d.wgLogs) wgLogs = d.wgLogs; if (d.suppLogs) suppLogs = d.suppLogs; if (d.slLogs) slLogs = d.slLogs; if (d.diaperLogs) diaperLogs = d.diaperLogs; if (d.careLogs) careLogs = d.careLogs; if (d.illEpisodes) illEpisodes = d.illEpisodes; if (d.illFeverLogs) illFeverLogs = d.illFeverLogs; if (d.illMeds) illMeds = d.illMeds; if (d.growthLogs) growthLogs = d.growthLogs; if (d.vaxRecords) vaxRecords = d.vaxRecords; if (d.vaxSkipped && typeof d.vaxSkipped==='object') Object.assign(vaxSkipped, d.vaxSkipped); if (d.allergyRecords) allergyRecords = d.allergyRecords; if (d.dentalRecords) dentalRecords = d.dentalRecords; if (d.vaxAppointments && typeof d.vaxAppointments==='object') Object.assign(vaxAppointments, d.vaxAppointments); if (d.toothRecords) toothRecords = d.toothRecords; if (d.badgeRecords) badgeRecords = d.badgeRecords; if (d.msRecords && typeof d.msRecords==='object') Object.assign(msRecords, d.msRecords); if (d.msCustomItems) msCustomItems = d.msCustomItems; if (d.assHistory) assHistory = d.assHistory; if (d.outActivities) outActivities = d.outActivities; if (d.assResults) assResults = d.assResults; if (d.szWardrobeItems) szWardrobeItems = d.szWardrobeItems; if (d.szMeasurements) szMeasurements = d.szMeasurements; if (d.szShoppingList) szShoppingList = d.szShoppingList; if (d.invItems) invItems = d.invItems; if (d.bgtExpenses) bgtExpenses = d.bgtExpenses; if (d.bgtMonthBudget) bgtMonthBudget = d.bgtMonthBudget; if (d.bgtCatBudgets) bgtCatBudgets = d.bgtCatBudgets; if (d.famMembers) famMembers = d.famMembers; if (d.famSelf && typeof d.famSelf==='object') Object.assign(famSelf, d.famSelf); if (d.nfySettings && typeof d.nfySettings==='object') Object.assign(nfySettings, d.nfySettings); if (d.nfyHistory) nfyHistory = d.nfyHistory; if (d.fsMealLogs) fsMealLogs = d.fsMealLogs; if (d.fsCurrentStage) fsCurrentStage = d.fsCurrentStage; if (d.glCustomItems) glCustomItems = d.glCustomItems; if (d.glGeneratedItems) glGeneratedItems = d.glGeneratedItems; if (d.diaryEntries) diaryEntries = d.diaryEntries; if (d.boardMessages) boardMessages = d.boardMessages; if (d.outChecklistItems) outChecklistItems = d.outChecklistItems; if (d.outChecklistChecked && typeof d.outChecklistChecked==='object') Object.assign(outChecklistChecked, d.outChecklistChecked); if (d.packChecked && typeof d.packChecked==='object') Object.assign(packChecked, d.packChecked); if (d.packCustomItems) packCustomItems = d.packCustomItems; if (d.packFavorites) packFavorites = d.packFavorites; if (d.featureVisible && typeof d.featureVisible==='object') Object.assign(featureVisible, d.featureVisible); if (d.recSavedLinks) recSavedLinks = d.recSavedLinks; dbSave(); updateHomeDisplay(); updateProfileForm(); try { renderMilkLog(); renderChart(); } catch(err){} try { grUpdatePills(); grRenderChart(); grRenderLog(); } catch(err){} try { slUpdatePills(); } catch(err){} try { szUpdateCurrentSize(); } catch(err){} try { featInit(); featApply(); } catch(err){} if (navigator.vibrate) navigator.vibrate([50,30,100]); sShowToast('✅ 資料還原成功！共 '+(milkCount+sleepCount+dpCount)+' 筆紀錄已恢復'); showVoice('備份資料還原完成！所有紀錄都回來了 🎉'); } catch(err) { sShowToast('⚠️ 還原失敗：'+err.message); } }, '📥'); } catch(err) { sShowToast('⚠️ 讀取檔案失敗，請確認是正確的備份檔'); } }; reader.readAsText(file, 'UTF-8'); } function dbUpdateExportLabel() { const el = document.getElementById('db-last-export-label'); if (!el) return; if (typeof expLastExport !== 'undefined' && expLastExport) { el.textContent = '上次備份：' + new Date(expLastExport).toLocaleString('zh-TW'); } else { el.textContent = '尚未備份過'; } } // DATA PERSISTENCE — localStorage // ===================================================== const DB_KEY = 'baby_diary_v2'; function dbSave() { try { const safe = v => (typeof v !== 'undefined') ? v : undefined; const data = { babyData: safe(babyData), milkLogs: safe(milkLogs), sTrials: safe(sTrials), wgLogs: safe(wgLogs), suppLogs: safe(suppLogs), slLogs: safe(slLogs), diaperLogs: safe(diaperLogs), careLogs: safe(careLogs), illEpisodes: safe(illEpisodes), illFeverLogs: safe(illFeverLogs), illMeds: safe(illMeds), growthLogs: safe(growthLogs), vaxRecords: safe(vaxRecords), vaxSkipped: safe(vaxSkipped), allergyRecords: safe(allergyRecords), dentalRecords: safe(dentalRecords), vaxAppointments: safe(vaxAppointments), toothRecords: safe(toothRecords), badgeRecords: safe(badgeRecords), msRecords: safe(msRecords), msCustomItems: safe(msCustomItems), assHistory: safe(assHistory), outActivities: safe(outActivities), assResults: safe(assResults), szWardrobeItems: safe(szWardrobeItems), szMeasurements: safe(szMeasurements), szShoppingList: safe(szShoppingList), invItems: safe(invItems), bgtExpenses: safe(bgtExpenses), bgtMonthBudget: safe(bgtMonthBudget), bgtCatBudgets: safe(bgtCatBudgets), famMembers: safe(famMembers), famSelf: safe(famSelf), famInviteCode: safe(famInviteCode), nfySettings: safe(nfySettings), nfyHistory: safe(nfyHistory), expLastExport: safe(expLastExport), // New feature data fsMealLogs: safe(fsMealLogs), fsCurrentStage: safe(fsCurrentStage), glCustomItems: safe(glCustomItems), glGeneratedItems: safe(glGeneratedItems), diaryEntries: safe(diaryEntries), boardMessages: safe(boardMessages), outChecklistItems: safe(outChecklistItems), outChecklistChecked: safe(outChecklistChecked), packChecked: safe(packChecked), packCustomItems: safe(packCustomItems), packFavorites: safe(packFavorites), featureVisible: safe(featureVisible), recSavedLinks: safe(recSavedLinks), outWishlist: safe(outWishlist), _saved: Date.now() }; localStorage.setItem(DB_KEY, JSON.stringify(data)); } catch(e) { console.warn('dbSave failed:', e); } } function dbLoad() { try { const raw = localStorage.getItem(DB_KEY); if (!raw) return false; const d = JSON.parse(raw); if (d.babyData && typeof d.babyData === "object") try { Object.assign(babyData, d.babyData); } catch(e){} // ensure bloodType field exists after load if (babyData.bloodType === undefined) babyData.bloodType = ''; if (d.milkLogs) milkLogs = d.milkLogs; if (d.sTrials) sTrials = d.sTrials; if (d.wgLogs) wgLogs = d.wgLogs; if (d.suppLogs) suppLogs = d.suppLogs; if (d.slLogs) slLogs = d.slLogs; if (d.diaperLogs) diaperLogs = d.diaperLogs; if (d.careLogs) careLogs = d.careLogs; if (d.illEpisodes) illEpisodes = d.illEpisodes; if (d.illFeverLogs) illFeverLogs = d.illFeverLogs; if (d.illMeds) illMeds = d.illMeds; if (d.growthLogs) growthLogs = d.growthLogs; if (d.vaxRecords) vaxRecords = d.vaxRecords; if (d.vaxSkipped && typeof d.vaxSkipped === "object") try { Object.assign(vaxSkipped, d.vaxSkipped); } catch(e){} if (d.allergyRecords) allergyRecords = d.allergyRecords; if (d.dentalRecords) dentalRecords = d.dentalRecords; if (d.vaxAppointments && typeof d.vaxAppointments === 'object') Object.assign(vaxAppointments, d.vaxAppointments); if (d.toothRecords) toothRecords = d.toothRecords; if (d.badgeRecords) badgeRecords = d.badgeRecords; if (d.msRecords && typeof d.msRecords==='object') Object.assign(msRecords, d.msRecords); if (d.msCustomItems) msCustomItems = d.msCustomItems; if (d.assHistory) assHistory = d.assHistory; if (d.outActivities) outActivities = d.outActivities; if (d.assResults) assResults = d.assResults; if (d.szWardrobeItems) szWardrobeItems = d.szWardrobeItems; if (d.szMeasurements) szMeasurements = d.szMeasurements; if (d.szShoppingList) szShoppingList = d.szShoppingList; if (d.invItems) invItems = d.invItems; if (d.bgtExpenses) bgtExpenses = d.bgtExpenses; if (d.bgtMonthBudget) bgtMonthBudget = d.bgtMonthBudget; if (d.bgtCatBudgets) bgtCatBudgets = d.bgtCatBudgets; if (d.famMembers) famMembers = d.famMembers; if (d.famSelf && typeof d.famSelf === "object") try { Object.assign(famSelf, d.famSelf); } catch(e){} if (d.famInviteCode) famInviteCode = d.famInviteCode; if (d.nfySettings && typeof d.nfySettings === "object") try { Object.assign(nfySettings, d.nfySettings); } catch(e){} if (d.nfyHistory) nfyHistory = d.nfyHistory; if (d.expLastExport) expLastExport = d.expLastExport; // New feature data if (d.fsMealLogs) fsMealLogs = d.fsMealLogs; if (d.fsCurrentStage) fsCurrentStage = d.fsCurrentStage; if (d.glCustomItems) glCustomItems = d.glCustomItems; if (d.glGeneratedItems) glGeneratedItems = d.glGeneratedItems; if (d.diaryEntries) diaryEntries = d.diaryEntries; if (d.boardMessages) boardMessages = d.boardMessages; if (d.outChecklistItems) outChecklistItems = d.outChecklistItems; if (d.outChecklistChecked && typeof d.outChecklistChecked==='object') Object.assign(outChecklistChecked, d.outChecklistChecked); if (d.packChecked && typeof d.packChecked==='object') Object.assign(packChecked, d.packChecked); if (d.packCustomItems) packCustomItems = d.packCustomItems; if (d.packFavorites) packFavorites = d.packFavorites; if (d.featureVisible && typeof d.featureVisible === 'object') Object.assign(featureVisible, d.featureVisible); if (d.recSavedLinks) recSavedLinks = d.recSavedLinks; if (d.outWishlist) outWishlist = d.outWishlist; console.log('[Baby Diary] Data loaded from localStorage ✅'); return true; } catch(e) { console.warn('dbLoad failed:', e); return false; } } // Auto-save: debounced, fires 1.5s after last change let _dbSaveTimer = null; function dbAutosave() { clearTimeout(_dbSaveTimer); _dbSaveTimer = setTimeout(dbSave, 1500); } // Patch all key write functions to auto-save // sShowToast auto-saves via the click listener below // ===== INIT ===== window.onload = function() { try { // ── Load persisted data first ── const hadData = dbLoad(); try { if(typeof dbUpdateExportLabel==='function') dbUpdateExportLabel(); } catch(e){} try { if(typeof featInit==='function'){ featInit(); featApply(); } } catch(e){} try { if(typeof slRestoreTimer==='function') slRestoreTimer(); } catch(e){} const now = new Date(); const pad = n => String(n).padStart(2,'0'); const bottleEl = document.getElementById('bottle-time'); if (bottleEl) bottleEl.value = pad(now.getHours())+':'+pad(now.getMinutes()); const breastEl = document.getElementById('breast-time'); if (breastEl) breastEl.value = `${now.getFullYear()}-${pad(now.getMonth()+1)}-${pad(now.getDate())}T${pad(now.getHours())}:${pad(now.getMinutes())}`; try { renderChart(); } catch(e) { console.warn('renderChart:', e); } try { sRender(); } catch(e) { console.warn('sRender:', e); } try { renderMilkLog(); } catch(e) { console.warn('renderMilkLog:', e); } try { updateHomeDisplay(); } catch(e) { console.warn('updateHomeDisplay:', e); } // Re-render any open panels after load if (hadData) { try { grUpdatePills(); } catch(e){} try { updateMilkRecommendation(); } catch(e){} try { showVoice('歡迎回來！' + (babyData.name||'寶寶') + ' 的紀錄已恢復 🌸'); } catch(e){} } else { try { showVoice('嗨！我是花花～歡迎使用寶貝日記！🌸 先到「我的」設定寶寶資料喔！'); } catch(e){} } // Auto-save on any user interaction document.addEventListener('click', dbAutosave, {passive:true}); document.addEventListener('touchend', dbAutosave, {passive:true}); // Save before page unload window.addEventListener('beforeunload', dbSave); window.addEventListener('pagehide', dbSave); document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', () => { if (document.visibilityState==='hidden') dbSave(); }); } catch(e) { console.error('onload error:', e); } };
